programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Contestants from in and around Edinburgh vie to host the best dinner party, beginning with competitive couple Michelle and Cameron, who deliver a Spanish-themed first meal. The second day throws up some tuba playing and extreme wine reactions at the home of bad joker Lindsay and his fiancee Tara. Last to host are Lehandra and Joe, who have only been dating for five months and have never thrown a dinner party before

programme.title: George Clarkes Old House, New Home
programme.desc: Events manager Mitch and kitchen designer Elliot recently bagged themselves a bargain home in Bromley, Kent, and wasted no time in gutting the interior. The only problem is, now they have no idea working out where everything should go and how to add style and proportion while sticking to their monochrome design throughout. Enter George Clarke to give them a few tips. The architect also pays a visit to a workshop where bespoke antique mirrors are made. But will he be able to achieve a distressed effect without getting too distressed himself?

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge sees The Bridges of Madison County and begins pining for a little romance to spice up her life, so the family reminisces about impassioned encounters in days gone by. Featuring the guest voices of Michelle Pfeiffer and Kelsey Grammer

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Substitute teacher Mrs Cantwell (Tina Fey) takes an instant dislike to Lisa, and vows to give the youngster extra credit if she can figure out why. Meanwhile, Flanders is plagued with guilt after punching Homer. Featuring the guest voice of author Richard Dawkins

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Mr Burns attempts to fulfil his lifelong ambition of becoming a superhero and take down a rogues gallery of familiar faces, but devoted sidekick Smithers secretly intervenes after noticing his boss isnt quite up to the challenge. Lisa steps in as Barts attorney when he is falsely accused of pulling an Easter prank

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer is recruited to be a church deacon by the trendy new reverend - but when he starts to embrace the faith a little too seriously, Bart asks Flanders to help him track down their former pastor, the Rev Lovejoy. Meanwhile, the dry cleaners mistakenly swap Marges wedding dress for one of Krustys clown costumes. With the guest voice of Edward Norton

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Doug coaches a kids football team, but is persuaded by Deacons son to take up the sport himself. Though Carrie is impressed with his new determination to get into shape, he soon realises how unfit he has become once he takes to the field

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Arthur grows jealous of a new dog on Hollys route, and Doug envies Carries close relationship with a gay colleague, deciding to spend more time with Deacon to get even with her. American comedy, starring Kevin James, Leah Remini and Jerry Stiller

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Carrie grows jealous when she discovers Dougs mother has a healthy relationship with his former girlfriend. American comedy, starring Leah Remini and Lola Glaudini

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Doug goes to confession, where he tells the priest how he took a dirty photo of himself at a wedding - and pinned the blame on Danny when the offending picture was discovered. Meanwhile, Arthur resorts to desperate measures to expose the culprit

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray enlists his mothers help to reassure Ally, who is afraid to sleep in her own room because she is convinced it becomes the haunt of monsters once the lights go out. Ray Romano stars

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Marie is thrilled to learn that Roberts new girlfriend is a virgin, so Ray tries to convince her that Debra is a good girl too, leading to a revelation from Marie and Frank

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra gets involved in a heated dispute with another parent at Allys little league baseball match, but Ray fails to take her side because he is afraid of making himself unpopular. Dan Castellaneta, better known as the voice of Homer Simpson, guest stars

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Part three of three. As Niles continues to recover from open-heart surgery, he masks his fear of death with overconfidence and an elaborate show of zest for life. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: As the Christmas season draws near, Frasier is furious to learn that Daphne and Niles want to host the family get-together, prompting a feud between the brothers. Meanwhile, Roz finds herself falling for a department store Santa Claus. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer, David Hyde Pierce and Jane Leeves

programme.title: Sunday Brunch
programme.desc: Tim Lovejoy and Simon Rimmer are joined by guests Tyler West, Chloe Burrows, Damien Molony, Jessie Ware, Alex James, Paddy Young and Ania Magliano. With music from Skindred

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer, Moe and Lenny go in pursuit of Carl when he skips town with $200,000 in winnings from a lottery ticket he bought with them. However, their search makes them realise how little they know about their friend and almost reaches a dead-end until Lisa points them in the direction of Iceland. Featuring music by Sigur Ros

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge is feeling neglected by Homer, and the timing couldnt be worse as their 10th wedding anniversary is fast approaching. Little does she know her husband is planning a grand romantic gesture inspired by a special moment from their first year of marriage. But wires get crossed when the miffed housewife stumbles upon a dodgy website for couples bored of their partners, and she ends up chatting to the too-good-to-be-true Ben (voiced by Family Guy creator Seth MacFarlane)

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge encourages Bart to explore his creative side and signs him up for piano lessons, but the youngster is less than enthusiastic about the prospect until he meets his Russian teacher Zhenya. Meanwhile, Homer is distraught after losing his last two hairs and becoming completely bald. Guest starring the voices of Jane Krakowski, Bill Hader and Justin Bieber

programme.title: George Clarkes Amazing Spaces
programme.sub-title: Touring Theatre and Secret Garden Flat
programme.desc: The presenter and master craftsman Will Hardie come to the end of their architectural world tour of the UK with a delicious taste of Italy in north Wales Portmeirion. The duo complete their most ambitious build yet, bringing the outside in as they unveil their studio flat that also converts into a magical secret garden

programme.title: Sailing the Shipping Forecast with the Rev Richard Coles
programme.desc: Richard meets the rebels and risk takers of the shipping forecast area of the Thames, revisiting his youth as a member of the Communards when he visits Radio Caroline. He also explores the Old Royal Naval College, where he has his first ever sailing lesson. Venturing north to Harwich, Richard meets the maritime pilot bringing one of the worlds biggest container ships into port

programme.title: Our Tiny Islands
programme.desc: In this final edition, cameras follow Wez in St Marys on the Isles of Scilly, whos come up with a unique event - a 60-kilometre race around all five islands in just one day. The programme also takes a look at the island of Piel, which is just off the coast of northwest England, as well as a natural nature reserve on Bardsey Island in Wales

programme.title: Devon and Cornwall
programme.desc: In the fold of the foothills of Exmoor, Devon farmers Rob and Sarah Taylor prepare their native ponies for the show season, but first they need to round them up from off the moor. At the southern tip of Cornwall, the South West Coastal Path is under threat of erosion from the thousands of footsteps veering off the marked track each year

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Inside the Worlds Most Luxurious
programme.sub-title: Inside the Worlds Most Luxurious Yachts
programme.desc: Behind the scenes on some of the worlds most extravagant yachts. Cameras follow John Caudwell, the founder of Phones4u, as he takes a family holiday on the high seas, and capture the action at the Superyacht Cup, where the crew of the multi-million-pound monohull yacht The Rose are hoping to win an unprecedented third consecutive victory

programme.title: The Great Celebrity Bake Off for Stand Up to Cancer
programme.desc: Another batch of celebrities put their baking skills to the test, for charity, with new judge Caroline Waldegrave joining Paul Hollywood, Noel Fielding and Alison Hammond. Married couple Chris and Rosie Ramsey go up against each other, alongside a sibling rivalry, as Scarlette Douglas squares up to her brother Stuart. The celebs make tea-time classic scones, before taking on a chocolatey old-school favourite and recreating their career highlight in cake

programme.title: Your Song
programme.desc: Alison Hammond takes the pop-up stage to Edinburgh. A woman sings an Etta James number for the bus driver who left her a handwritten note and drove away, a 22-year-old performs his mums favourite song, a former soldier sings the Zach Bryan track that helped him through PTSD, and a hospital volunteer sings A Fond Kiss by Robert Burns for a D-Day veteran on his 100th birthday

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The viewers check out Secret Garden, Love on the Spectrum, Celebrity Bridge of Lies, Gordon Ramsays Secret Service, The Housemaid and Conspiracies and Coverups

programme.title: Chernobyl: Days That Shocked the World
programme.desc: Part two of two. The second half of the documentary examines the cause of the disaster, and how the Soviet authorities quickly pointed the finger at operator error, intentionally concealing a flaw with the reactor design. Plus, a look at how the conflict between Ukraine and Russia risks unleashing further radiation by damaging the hastily built shelter entombing the wreckage

programme.title: Gordon Ramsays Secret Service
programme.desc: The no-nonsense chef sets out to help restaurants in need - by spying on them using a state-of-the-art surveillance system and with the help of a mole on the inside. For his first mission, he gains a 360-degree view of Parthenon, a family run Greek restaurant in Washington, DC. It was once a pillar of the community but its decor, utilities and hygiene are severely lacking. Gordon sets out to give owner Pete the tools he needs to improve the eatery so he can hand over the reins to his son

programme.title: Gordon Ramsays Secret Service
programme.desc: Gordon visits the Italian bistro Caffe Boa, where he exposes the toxic working relationship between husband-and-wife owners Patrick and Jenny. Can he change Patricks ways to save his business - and his marriage?

programme.title: Outrageous Homes
programme.desc: Interior design expert Laurence Llewelyn-Bowen celebrates great British visionaries, cherished eccentrics and proud-to-be-different homeowners. He begins by meeting Dawn, whose home was once owned by millionaire publisher Felix Dennis. Felix built the impressive barn on a party theme, with swashbuckling pirates and real palm trees. The house itself is set around an indoor gigantic swimming pool. Laurence also meets Billy, who has converted his cottage garden into a Wild West ranch with its very own saloon moonshine and catches up with 1970s-fanatic Estelle, who treats him to the furnishing delights of her beloved decade

programme.title: George Clarkes Old House, New Home
programme.desc: Albert and Kristina have moved into a coach house in Leamington Spa which was last decorated in the 1980s with a mock medieval style. With a baby on the way, the couple are desperate to make their new home into something special - so George kicks off by knocking a huge hole in the ceiling for extra headspace. Will his other ideas prove just as exciting? The architect also visits a 200-year-old farmhouse on the edge of the Peak District, where he faces difficulties as the owners are reluctant to let him knock down any walls

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three pairs of partners from Manchester compete to win the £1,000 prize, including married couple of 19 years Fiona and Ian, who kick off the competition with a Spanish-inspired meal. Later, young newlyweds Lauren and Pete shock their guests with a mature and refined menu, before Karl and Mukta serve up Indian-themed dishes alongside a few surprises

programme.title: Sunday Brunch
programme.desc: Highlights of the food and chat show, with Tim Lovejoy and Simon Rimmer

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer, Moe and Lenny go in pursuit of Carl when he skips town with $200,000 in winnings from a lottery ticket he bought with them. However, their search makes them realise how little they know about their friend and almost reaches a dead-end until Lisa points them in the direction of Iceland. Featuring music by Sigur Ros

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge is feeling neglected by Homer, and the timing couldnt be worse as their 10th wedding anniversary is fast approaching. programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge encourages Bart to explore his creative side and signs him up for piano lessons, but the youngster is less than enthusiastic about the prospect until he meets his Russian teacher Zhenya. Meanwhile, Homer is distraught after losing his last two hairs and becoming completely bald. Guest starring the voices of Jane Krakowski, Bill Hader and Justin Bieber

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray hosts the words-and-numbers quiz, with Rachel Riley taking care of the board and Susie Dent joined by Ranvir Singh in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Sam cracks open the champagne to celebrate Norms birthday, while Diane meets Frasiers mother, who threatens terrible consequences unless she stays away from her son

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Carla finds herself fighting her ex-husband Nick in a battle for custody of their eldest son. Comedy, starring Ted Danson and Rhea Perlman

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Diane moves in with Frasier, but unfortunately soon develops an allergic reaction to his dog. Comedy, starring Shelley Long and Kelsey Grammer

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Roberts traffic-school students complain they are fed up with his class, so he resorts to teaching them using a puppet - an innovation that proves far from boring. American comedy, starring Brad Garrett and Ray Romano

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: A discovery makes Ray worry about his mortality - and prompts him to compile a list of things he wants to do before he dies. Comedy, starring Ray Romano

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra clears out all the kids old baby clothes and gives them to a jumble sale, making Ray realise she is resigned to not having any more children

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The brothers visit a luxury spa, where they are astonished to discover they are not enjoying the highest level of service and try to sneak into an area reserved exclusively for its most valued members. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles is left with no choice but to see patients in his apartment, while Frasier is forced to share his studio and airtime with an arrogant financial analyst - and later finds himself accused of sexually harassing her. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Lilith pays an unexpected visit and asks Frasier an unusual favour, while Niles worries about Daphne, who has gone with Roz, Alice and Mrs Moon on a road trip to Canada. Guest starring Millicent Martin and Bebe Neuwirth, with Kelsey Grammer, David Hyde Pierce and Jane Leeves

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Daphne offers to host a dinner party to celebrate Niles latest purchase, knowing that previous soirees held by the brothers have ended badly. However, her own efforts fail to work out much better and Frasier is forced to lend a clandestine hand, while Martin masquerades as a famous artist

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: After almost a decade away from this show, Gordon Ramsay returns to visit struggling restaurants across America, spending a week trying to help them become more successful. The Bel Aire Diner in Astoria, New York, is a family-run business apparently crumbling under dysfunction. With their parents retiring, the fiery chef urges two brothers to work through their emotional conflicts to save their beloved restaurant

programme.title: Channel 4 News Summary
programme.desc: Midday news summary

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: The team heads to Birmingham, where Henry Cole stumbles upon a model metal tipper truck, which he is convinced will make some money

programme.title: Matt Baker: Travels with Mum and Dad
programme.desc: Matt, Mike and Janice head to County Durhams Bowes Museum, where they pick an ancient artwork to hang on the walls and bring a marvellous mechanical swan back to life. Elsewhere in Teesdale, Matt and Janice help prepare rare Teeswater sheep for shearing, while Janice gets the ultimate guide to the wildflowers growing in the surrounding Dales

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray, Rachel Riley and Susie Dent host, with Richard Whitehead in Dictionary Corner, as contestants race against the clock to pit their wits against words and numbers

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: The search is on around Abruzzo in Italy for a holiday home for carpenter David from Suffolk. Craig Rowe is on a mission to find him a one-bedroom apartment, ideally near the beach. With support also coming from Davids best friend Lucy, Craig has lined up five great options for his £45,000 budget, but will any be perfect enough to put in an offer?

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun: Where Are They Now?
programme.desc: Gîte owners Mark and Lesley, who have a passion for military history, take flight with a new idea over the Normandy beaches. Mancunian couple Jackie and Lee have built a luxury hillside campsite in Italy, but will they ever get permission to open it? After five years living and working in Almería, fitness instructor Ali from Somerset sets sail on a new adventure

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: Erin and JB race to light up their red salon before a drinks party. Anna and Edward rebuild a sweeping stairway, and Christina and Sassan transform their grand front gates

programme.title: Sun, Sea and Selling Houses
programme.desc: Documentary following two families who have set up shop in Spain selling properties to fellow Brits looking for a home in the sun. In Almería, the Garners juggle wow-factor villas and a bargain wildcard. On the Costa Blanca, the Aldertons clients face tough compromises

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: The Dog House
programme.desc: Twelve-year-old Ruby-Rose is ready to move up from dog sitting to having a dog of her own, and cheeky Yorkie Georgie might be the perfect match. Ex-cabbie Danny could be the ideal new owner for Bella the collie

programme.title: Suez: 24 Hours That Broke the British Empire
programme.desc: Part one of two. The inside story of November 6, 1956, the final day of the Suez Crisis. British troops are in Egypt supposedly on a peace-keeping mission, to protect the Suez Canal. But all is not as it seems. Nobody knows it, but the next 24 hours will change Britain for ever and determine the future shape of the world, told hour by hour, minute by minute through the eyes of historians and those at the heart of Government

programme.title: Chernobyl: Days That Shocked the World
programme.desc: Part one of two. Witnesses and survivors tell the story of the worlds worst nuclear accident, and the subsequent attempt by the Soviet government to cover it up. On the night of the explosion, the 50,000 residents of nearby Pripyat knew nothing of the disaster, until 36 hours later when local officials ordered a total evacuation of the town

programme.title: 24 Hours in Police Custody
programme.sub-title: 24 Hours in Police Custody: The Cold Case Murder
programme.desc: Part one of two. The inside story of the cold case investigation into the murder of an 86-year-old who was stabbed multiple times in 2013, before her body was set on fire. More than a decade later, detectives from the Major Crime Unit decide to reopen the investigation hoping that advances in DNA science will mean they can finally identify the killer

programme.title: Celebrity Gogglebox
programme.desc: Some of Britains best-known personalities appraise recent TV shows including Squid Game, Glastonbury, Open House: The Great Sex Experiment, Celebrity Bridge of Lies, Trainwreck: Poop Cruise, Millionaire Hoarders and Gary Barlows Food and Wine Tour: Australia

programme.title: Grayson Perry Has Seen the Future
programme.desc: Artist Grayson Perry heads for California on a mission to understand how Silicon Valleys booming tech industries are likely to shape the human future. His two-part journey begins in the Bay Area where he is assisted by an increasingly chummy chatbot. He meets everyone from leading players in the industry to idealistic young start-up founders, as well as ordinary people who are adopting the latest innovations and alarmed critics of the direction AI is taking the world

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef heads to family owned Italian restaurant Giuseppis in Macomb Township, Michigan. Father and son Joe and Sam Borgias constant fighting is driving customers away, and Gordon discovers one of the restaurateurs is concealing a serious health problem. Nevertheless, he sets about rescuing them from disaster and turning around the failing business

programme.title: George Clarkes Amazing Spaces
programme.desc: The architect meets a man trying to build the first UFO-styled prefabricated Futuro house seen in Britain for 50 years, and a woman creating a magical garden room using centuries-old techniques, involving earth, sand, straw and even human hair. Georges Italian road trip takes him to a traditional village, where he discovers the most modern of houses with an extraordinary design featuring a floating swimming pool. And, as he and Will get down to work on their wilderness retreat, theres a close shave involving an oak tree

programme.title: Britains Most Expensive Houses
programme.desc: John from the country office has a £3.6 million Arts and Crafts-style south coast seaside mansion to sell, Polina is listing a new central London penthouse worth £4.5 million - so new that it is not even on the market yet - and company owner Guy is in Barbados to view a $40 million beachside property where the rich and famous have stayed. Amber is keen to win one of Londons most expensive properties, a £75 million Knightsbridge home that once belonged to prima ballerina Margot Fonteyn

programme.title: Gordon Ramsays Secret Service
programme.desc: The no-nonsense chef sets out to help restaurants in need - by spying on them using a state-of-the-art surveillance system and with the help of a mole on the inside. For his first mission, he gains a 360-degree view of Parthenon, a family run Greek restaurant in Washington, DC. It was once a pillar of the community but its decor, utilities and hygiene are severely lacking. Gordon sets out to give owner Pete the tools he needs to improve the eatery so he can hand over the reins to his son

programme.title: Gordon Ramsays Secret Service
programme.desc: Gordon visits the Italian bistro Caffe Boa, where he exposes the toxic working relationship between husband-and-wife owners Patrick and Jenny. Can he change Patricks ways to save his business - and his marriage?

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Fiery chef Gordon Ramsay comes to the aid of a mother-and-son team who have gone through 20 chefs in two years at their struggling Italian restaurant in California. The adjoining bar is a triumph, but the oldest dining establishment in town needs an overhaul if the inexperienced owners are to make a profit

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Contestants from in and around Edinburgh vie to host the best dinner party, beginning with competitive couple Michelle and Cameron, who deliver a Spanish-themed first meal. The second day throws up some tuba playing and extreme wine reactions at the home of bad joker Lindsay and his fiancee Tara. Last to host are Lehandra and Joe, who have only been dating for five months and have never thrown a dinner party before

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The viewers check out Secret Garden, Love on the Spectrum, Celebrity Bridge of Lies, Gordon Ramsays Secret Service, The Housemaid and Conspiracies and Coverups

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: A 50-year-old hairstylist meets a well-travelled nutritionist, a conspiracy theorist is matched with a science teacher and an opera singer serenades his date. A high-energy spin instructor meets a passionate PE teacher. Will sparks fly, or does fate have other plans?

programme.title: Celebrity Gogglebox
programme.desc: Some of Britains best-known personalities appraise recent TV shows including Squid Game, Glastonbury, Open House: The Great Sex Experiment, Celebrity Bridge of Lies, Trainwreck: Poop Cruise, Millionaire Hoarders and Gary Barlows Food and Wine Tour: Australia

programme.title: Outrageous Homes
programme.desc: Interior design expert Laurence Llewelyn-Bowen celebrates great British visionaries, cherished eccentrics and proud-to-be-different homeowners. He begins by meeting Dawn, whose home was once owned by millionaire publisher Felix Dennis. Felix built the impressive barn on a party theme, with swashbuckling pirates and real palm trees. The house itself is set around an indoor gigantic swimming pool. Laurence also meets Billy, who has converted his cottage garden into a Wild West ranch with its very own saloon moonshine and catches up with 1970s-fanatic Estelle, who treats him to the furnishing delights of her beloved decade

programme.title: George Clarkes Old House, New Home
programme.desc: Albert and Kristina have moved into a coach house in Leamington Spa which was last decorated in the 1980s with a mock medieval style. With a baby on the way, the couple are desperate to make their new home into something special - so George kicks off by knocking a huge hole in the ceiling for extra headspace. Will his other ideas prove just as exciting? The architect also visits a 200-year-old farmhouse on the edge of the Peak District, where he faces difficulties as the owners are reluctant to let him knock down any walls

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three pairs of partners from Manchester compete to win the £1,000 prize, including married couple of 19 years Fiona and Ian, who kick off the competition with a Spanish-inspired meal. Later, young newlyweds Lauren and Pete shock their guests with a mature and refined menu, before Karl and Mukta serve up Indian-themed dishes alongside a few surprises

programme.title: Sunday Brunch
programme.desc: Highlights of the food and chat show, with Tim Lovejoy and Simon Rimmer

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer, Moe and Lenny go in pursuit of Carl when he skips town with $200,000 in winnings from a lottery ticket he bought with them. However, their search makes them realise how little they know about their friend and almost reaches a dead-end until Lisa points them in the direction of Iceland. Featuring music by Sigur Ros

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge is feeling neglected by Homer, and the timing couldnt be worse as their 10th wedding anniversary is fast approaching. Little does she know her husband is planning a grand romantic gesture inspired by a special moment from their first year of marriage. But wires get crossed when the miffed housewife stumbles upon a dodgy website for couples bored of their partners, and she ends up chatting to the too-good-to-be-true Ben (voiced by Family Guy creator Seth MacFarlane)

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge encourages Bart to explore his creative side and signs him up for piano lessons, but the youngster is less than enthusiastic about the prospect until he meets his Russian teacher Zhenya. Meanwhile, Homer is distraught after losing his last two hairs and becoming completely bald. Guest starring the voices of Jane Krakowski, Bill Hader and Justin Bieber

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray hosts the words-and-numbers quiz, with Rachel Riley taking care of the board and Susie Dent joined by Ranvir Singh in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Sam cracks open the champagne to celebrate Norms birthday, while Diane meets Frasiers mother, who threatens terrible consequences unless she stays away from her son

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Carla finds herself fighting her ex-husband Nick in a battle for custody of their eldest son. Comedy, starring Ted Danson and Rhea Perlman

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Diane moves in with Frasier, but unfortunately soon develops an allergic reaction to his dog. Comedy, starring Shelley Long and Kelsey Grammer

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Roberts traffic-school students complain they are fed up with his class, so he resorts to teaching them using a puppet - an innovation that proves far from boring. American comedy, starring Brad Garrett and Ray Romano

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: A discovery makes Ray worry about his mortality - and prompts him to compile a list of things he wants to do before he dies. Comedy, starring Ray Romano

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra clears out all the kids old baby clothes and gives them to a jumble sale, making Ray realise she is resigned to not having any more children

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The brothers visit a luxury spa, where they are astonished to discover they are not enjoying the highest level of service and try to sneak into an area reserved exclusively for its most valued members. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles is left with no choice but to see patients in his apartment, while Frasier is forced to share his studio and airtime with an arrogant financial analyst - and later finds himself accused of sexually harassing her. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Lilith pays an unexpected visit and asks Frasier an unusual favour, while Niles worries about Daphne, who has gone with Roz, Alice and Mrs Moon on a road trip to Canada. Guest starring Millicent Martin and Bebe Neuwirth, with Kelsey Grammer, David Hyde Pierce and Jane Leeves

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Daphne offers to host a dinner party to celebrate Niles latest purchase, knowing that previous soirees held by the brothers have ended badly. However, her own efforts fail to work out much better and Frasier is forced to lend a clandestine hand, while Martin masquerades as a famous artist

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: After almost a decade away from this show, Gordon Ramsay returns to visit struggling restaurants across America, spending a week trying to help them become more successful. The Bel Aire Diner in Astoria, New York, is a family-run business apparently crumbling under dysfunction. With their parents retiring, the fiery chef urges two brothers to work through their emotional conflicts to save their beloved restaurant

programme.title: Channel 4 News Summary
programme.desc: Midday news summary

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: The team heads to Birmingham, where Henry Cole stumbles upon a model metal tipper truck, which he is convinced will make some money

programme.title: Matt Baker: Travels with Mum and Dad
programme.desc: Matt, Mike and Janice head to County Durhams Bowes Museum, where they pick an ancient artwork to hang on the walls and bring a marvellous mechanical swan back to life. Elsewhere in Teesdale, Matt and Janice help prepare rare Teeswater sheep for shearing, while Janice gets the ultimate guide to the wildflowers growing in the surrounding Dales

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray, Rachel Riley and Susie Dent host, with Richard Whitehead in Dictionary Corner, as contestants race against the clock to pit their wits against words and numbers

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: The search is on around Abruzzo in Italy for a holiday home for carpenter David from Suffolk. Craig Rowe is on a mission to find him a one-bedroom apartment, ideally near the beach. With support also coming from Davids best friend Lucy, Craig has lined up five great options for his £45,000 budget, but will any be perfect enough to put in an offer?

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun: Where Are They Now?
programme.desc: Gîte owners Mark and Lesley, who have a passion for military history, take flight with a new idea over the Normandy beaches. Mancunian couple Jackie and Lee have built a luxury hillside campsite in Italy, but will they ever get permission to open it? After five years living and working in Almería, fitness instructor Ali from Somerset sets sail on a new adventure

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: Erin and JB race to light up their red salon before a drinks party. Anna and Edward rebuild a sweeping stairway, and Christina and Sassan transform their grand front gates

programme.title: Sun, Sea and Selling Houses
programme.desc: Documentary following two families who have set up shop in Spain selling properties to fellow Brits looking for a home in the sun. In Almería, the Garners juggle wow-factor villas and a bargain wildcard. On the Costa Blanca, the Aldertons clients face tough compromises

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: The Dog House
programme.desc: Twelve-year-old Ruby-Rose is ready to move up from dog sitting to having a dog of her own, and cheeky Yorkie Georgie might be the perfect match. Ex-cabbie Danny could be the ideal new owner for Bella the collie

programme.title: Suez: 24 Hours That Broke the British Empire
programme.desc: Part one of two. The inside story of November 6, 1956, the final day of the Suez Crisis. British troops are in Egypt supposedly on a peace-keeping mission, to protect the Suez Canal. But all is not as it seems. Nobody knows it, but the next 24 hours will change Britain for ever and determine the future shape of the world, told hour by hour, minute by minute through the eyes of historians and those at the heart of Government

programme.title: Chernobyl: Days That Shocked the World
programme.desc: Part one of two. Witnesses and survivors tell the story of the worlds worst nuclear accident, and the subsequent attempt by the Soviet government to cover it up. On the night of the explosion, the 50,000 residents of nearby Pripyat knew nothing of the disaster, until 36 hours later when local officials ordered a total evacuation of the town

programme.title: Chernobyl: Days That Shocked the World
programme.desc: Part two of two. The second half of the documentary examines the cause of the disaster, and how the Soviet authorities quickly pointed the finger at operator error, intentionally concealing a flaw with the reactor design. Plus, a look at how the conflict between Ukraine and Russia risks unleashing further radiation by damaging the hastily built shelter entombing the wreckage

programme.title: 24 Hours in Police Custody
programme.sub-title: 24 Hours in Police Custody: The Cold Case Murder
programme.desc: The second of a two-part special looking into the murder of 86-year-old Una Crown, who was stabbed multiple times in 2013. Forensics get a partial DNA match to a man who had previously been arrested but released due to lack of evidence. Police decide to bring him in once more in the hope that after 13 years of denial, he will finally confess to the killing

programme.title: Grayson Perry Has Seen the Future
programme.desc: Artist Grayson Perry heads for California on a mission to understand how Silicon Valleys booming tech industries are likely to shape the human future. His two-part journey begins in the Bay Area where he is assisted by an increasingly chummy chatbot. He meets everyone from leading players in the industry to idealistic young start-up founders, as well as ordinary people who are adopting the latest innovations and alarmed critics of the direction AI is taking the world

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef heads to family owned Italian restaurant Giuseppis in Macomb Township, Michigan. Father and son Joe and Sam Borgias constant fighting is driving customers away, and Gordon discovers one of the restaurateurs is concealing a serious health problem. Nevertheless, he sets about rescuing them from disaster and turning around the failing business

programme.title: George Clarkes Amazing Spaces
programme.desc: The architect meets a man trying to build the first UFO-styled prefabricated Futuro house seen in Britain for 50 years, and a woman creating a magical garden room using centuries-old techniques, involving earth, sand, straw and even human hair. Georges Italian road trip takes him to a traditional village, where he discovers the most modern of houses with an extraordinary design featuring a floating swimming pool. And, as he and Will get down to work on their wilderness retreat, theres a close shave involving an oak tree

programme.title: Britains Most Expensive Houses
programme.desc: John from the country office has a £3.6 million Arts and Crafts-style south coast seaside mansion to sell, Polina is listing a new central London penthouse worth £4.5 million - so new that it is not even on the market yet - and company owner Guy is in Barbados to view a $40 million beachside property where the rich and famous have stayed. Amber is keen to win one of Londons most expensive properties, a £75 million Knightsbridge home that once belonged to prima ballerina Margot Fonteyn

programme.title: Unreported World
programme.desc: Japan is often portrayed as a modern utopia, but beneath its polished exterior, one of the worlds oldest populations is reaching a breaking point. As traditional multi-generational families break down, millions of elderly people are being left in isolation and poverty - with many turning to petty theft to survive. As Japanese prisons become retirement homes for a growing number of elderly convicts, Krishnan Guru-Murthy investigates this geriatric crime wave gripping the country

programme.title: Kirsties House of Craft
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp takes on food-inspired crafts by creating vegetable-printed greeting cards and trinket dishes made from salt dough

programme.title: Hollyoaks Omnibus
programme.desc: As Frankie prepares to say goodbye to the village, the Keane clan pack up their belongings, ready to surprise their estranged family by moving to Hollyoaks. But in a devastating twist of fate, everything spirals out of control, and its a race against time when an overturned van is spotted on the side of the road... Meanwhile, a residents buried secret is revealed. And while things look up for Dodger and Theresa, Kathleen-Angel causes tension. Writers: Emily Gascoyne, Steve Hughes; Dir: Sean Glynn; Prod Co: Lime PicturesShort: As Frankie prepares to leave Hollyoaks, the Keane family get ready to move in. But in a devastating twist of fate, things spiral out of control. And a buried secret is revealed.

programme.desc: Heartbroken Ross makes a sacrifice for Rachel, Monica faces a difficult decision over a career opportunity and Chandler is surprised by Joeys strange choice of gift

programme.desc: Joey proves a hit with his co-star, despite what the critics think. Rachel dates a stranger who seems outwardly charming - until he starts screaming at people. Unfortunately, only Ross witnesses his bizarre behaviour and nobody else believes him. Guest starring Ben Stiller

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Ross discovers a strange growth on his buttocks, Phoebe finds it hard to choose between two prospective lovers, and Monicas boyfriend surprises her. Comedy, starring David Schwimmer and Lisa Kudrow

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Ultimate Fighting Champion
programme.desc: Monicas rich boyfriend embarks on a bid to become the Ultimate Fighting Champion. Comedy, guest starring Robin Williams and Billy Crystal

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Phoebe receives shocking news about her past, while Rachel is envious of Rosss uninhibited girlfriend. Monica mourns her previous relationships, prompting Chandler to offer his services as a boyfriend. Joey nags the pals to play a game involving removing items of clothing

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Rachel realises she wants to start dating Ross again and writes him an 18-page letter expressing her feelings - but he falls asleep while reading it. Phoebe and her estranged birth mother discover they have a lot in common, and Monica is stung by a jellyfish

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Monica goes on a date with her high-school heart-throb. Ross begins playing tricks on Rachel, and Phoebe convinces herself a stray cat is the reincarnation of her long-dead mother. Comedy, starring Lisa Kudrow, Jennifer Aniston and Courteney Cox

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Chandler finds himself in hot water while dating Rachels pushy boss. Joey decides to buy an encyclopaedia, but discovers he can only afford one volume, and Monica resolves to prove her mother wrong. Comedy, starring Matthew Perry, Jennifer Aniston and Courteney Cox

programme.title: Michael McIntyres Big Show
programme.desc: The lively comedian hosts an evening of entertainment, recorded in front of an audience assembled at Londons Theatre Royal on Drury Lane. Each week, Michael introduces sets by his fellow stand-ups, musical performances, dance revues and various other hijinks. He begins by inviting RandB star Tinie Tempah to perform, and the Peres Brothers Group put on a dazzling acrobatic show. The host also hijacks former Spice Girl Geri Horners mobile phone in Celebrity Send To All, which sees him fire of an embassassing message to all the contacts in her directory, and one unsuspecting member of the public is given a chance to sing a special duet with Michael Ball in Unexpected Star

programme.desc: Car mad groom-to-be Adam brings the two loves of his life together, by organising a wedding ceremony for his fiancee Victoria in the middle of a car show. programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef travels to Los Angeles to help La Frite, an outdated French restaurant that is failing to make any profits. His first step is to try to reconcile the feuding family members who run the business, and so devises a plan to bring them together by using secret filming

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA

programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay revisits three of the restaurants he tried to save, returning to Lido, Anna Vincenzos and Le Bistro to find out whether his advice has been put to good use

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay heads to Eagle Rock in California to try to change the fortunes of Capri, a grubby restaurant that often remains closed during lunchtime because of the twin owners lazy attitude. programme.title: Taskmaster Bleeped
programme.desc: No-naughty-bits version. In a particularly active edition of Taskmaster, Armando Iannucci adopts a new persona to perform a daring stunt, Kumail Nanjiani grapples with bowling pins while wearing oven gloves, and Joanna Page attempts a tricky skill she hasnt tried since she was about 12 years old. Meanwhile, a topless Joel Dommett twirls a pretty umbrella, and someone shouts about scrambled eggs to Amy Gledhill. Greg Davies rules his kingdom with his customary combination of ferocity and occasional kindness, while Alex Horne offers his undying adoration and unquestioning support. programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: The bakers are hoping for a Hollywood handshake this week as they tackle bread, the steely-eyed judges speciality. For the showstopper, they tackle the decorative Swedish sandwich cake the smorgåstårta. Who will claim star baker - and who will be hanging up their apron?

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: The bakers take on three challenges exploring authentic Mexican bakes, as they put their twist on the classic sweet bread pan dulce for the Signature, tackle a Mexican street food staple in the Technical, and make their own showstopping version of the milk-soaked tres leches cake. Which bakers will impress Prue Leith and Paul Hollywood enough to keep their place in the tent, and who will be heading home? Noel Fielding and Matt Lucas present

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Noel Fielding and Matt Lucas host dessert week, which sees the amateur bakers attempting a trio of sticky challenges. They get all steamed up in the signature, tackle a classic lemon meringue in the technical and for the showstopper are tasked with creating a sponge cake with a surprise inside. Prue Leith and Paul Hollywood are on hand to taste the results - and decide who will be leaving this week

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off

programme.title: Jamies Money Saving Meals
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver demonstrates how to prepare nutritious meals on a budget, offering tips on keeping costs down and wasting less food. Beginning with recipes that work out at less than £1.80 a portion, he cooks up a roast brisket of beef with all the trimmings, Korean stir-fried rice, and sweet pea fish pie, before showing a takeaway lover how to make his favourite treat for a fraction of the price of ordering it in

programme.title: Jamies Money Saving Meals
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver demonstrates how to prepare nutritious meals for an average of £1.30 a portion. Thriller, starring Stephen Dorff, Chyler Leigh and Tom Berenger

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: The 100th episode of the series focuses on the love between patients and their nearest and dearest. Sir John Cockburn, whos 89, arrives at St Georges with acute abdominal pain and medics think it could be an abdominal aortic aneurysm and he faces emergency surgery. Meanwhile, 68-year-old Mick and his wife Linda have been involved in a head-on car crash. Mick took the brunt of the impact and has multiple injuries from top to toe that could be life-changing. The couple fell in love after leaving previous relationships, making a happy life together in their mobile home. And 10-year-old Niall is brought to AandE after falling 8ft from a tree on a family picnic. Hes broken his arm so badly it looks like a banana, and orthopaedic doctors need to work out how to get it back in place

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: The heli-medics race to assist Linda, who has suffered a heart attack on a Norfolk beach. Motocross rider Alex is in a bad way after being hit by another bike. Meanwhile, in Cumbria, 15-year-old cyclist Dan is treated for a possible skull fracture after colliding with a car on a country road

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Junior doctor Simon is concerned 40-year-old doorman Alfred, who was stabbed multiple times outside the social club where he works, may have internal injuries. Eighteen-year-old student George is brought into resus with blood coming from his ear and behaving erratically, following a fight at a party, and is sent for an urgent scan when consultant Phil becomes worried he may have a life-threatening bleed on his brain

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: The emergency room documentary continues, highlighting the stories of people facing adversity head-on. Erin, a 61-year-old former cancer patient with an ear infection, is rushed to St Georges Hospital after she collapsed at home. Doctors fear the condition may have spread to her brain, and send her for a CT scan to find out more. Tony, a 70-year-old part-time DJ, arrives in AandE after being involved in a high-speed bicycle accident while training for a 100-mile charity bike ride, and Charlie, a 39-year-old cabin crew worker, turns up at the hospital complaining of unbearable pain after discharging himself during a previous visit, and removing the cast fitted to support his broken arm

programme.title: Supermarkets Unwrapped
programme.desc: The team head for the Vegan Aisle for all the news on animal-free food. Helen Lawal visits Tesco to find out how they keep up with all the plant-based burger trend, John Whaite seeks out the secret to the snap in a vegan sausage skin, Kate Quilton finds out how exactly you milk an oat, and Briony May Williams learns how to make a quiche without egg

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: National Heritage worker Gillian Sutherland hosts the first dinner party in Inverness, and has high hopes that her guests - emergency-call handler Melissa Kirby, property tycoon David Edes, hair stylist Zarina Ainslie and personal fitness trainer Jamie Tulloch - will appreciate her traditional Scottish menu

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Designer-label fan Melissa Kirby hosts the second dinner party in Inverness, hoping her cooking lessons from one of the citys best chefs will win her the £1,000 prize. However, rival Gillian is unimpressed when she finds out the chef also made the gravy

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Property tycoon and teetotaller David Edes hosts a nautical evening for the third dinner party in Inverness, where his menu of basic but wholesome food makes his guests wary. A night of suspicion and hilarity between the diners ensues

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the fourth night of the contest in Inverness, it is hairdresser Zarina Ainslies turn to host. The fun-loving hopeful needs to live up to her lofty claims of being an amazing cook as her fellow contestants prepare to rate her on the evening

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Former professional footballer Jamie Tulloch hosts the final party in Inverness, going to the trouble of ensuring all the ingredients in his chosen dishes are locally sourced. However, it remains to be seen whether his home-grown approach to fine dining will be enough to impress his discerning fellow competitors, and as the night draws to a close, the weeks winner is revealed

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Diane and Gary are looking for an accessible holiday home with a pool in the all-year-round sunshine of Paphos on Cyprus. With three adult children and the recent arrival of their first grandchild, the couple cant wait to have all the family to stay, creating many years of happy memories together. Laura Hamilton sets out to find a property that keeps everyone happy on their budget of £130,000

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Gordon and Staci are singers from Glasgow, and it was their mutual love of music that brought them together 22 years ago. Now, with their children all grown up, theyre hoping to escape their hectic schedules back home and find their perfect holiday home in western Tenerife. With a budget of £170,000, can Lee Juggurnauth deliver their dream with any of the five fantastic properties hes found?

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Jean Johansson helps Ryan and Steve who want to buy a holiday home on the island of Gran Canaria. Their favourite resort is Maspalomas with its great beaches, shopping and nightlife. For their budget of £150,000, Jean shows them five properties to coinsider

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Retired GP surgery manager Suzie is looking for a holiday home for her and her husband Ram, on Spains Costa del Sol. Shes brings along her son Rishi to help her with the search. Laura Hamilton helps out, assessing what she can acquire with her £250,000 budget

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Craig Rowe meets teacher Kirsty from Co Armagh, who is looking for a holiday home on the Canary Island of Lanzarote, showing her five properties within her budget of £120,000

programme.title: Kirstie and Phils Love It or List It
programme.desc: Heather and Tim from Lothianburn enlist the help of the hosts to see if they can improve the seven-acre property they live in or if they should start afresh somewhere else. With Tim hating the dysfunctional layout, lack of storage and inadequate space for working from home, Phil Spencer looks for a new place that ticks all the boxes. Heather however loves their home and isnt ready to leave considering the work and money theyve put into making it theirs. She asks Kirstie Allsopp for help renovating, certain she can bring back the joy the couple once felt there

programme.title: George Clarkes Remarkable Renovations
programme.desc: Marcus and Kathryn have lived in the same house for nearly 20 years and raised their three children there, but Marcus has always dreamt of renovating his parents railway goods shed. When developers bought the land surrounding the building from his parents, he knew it was now or never

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition kicks off at Blackfriars in Inverness. After an afternoon of crafting, two guests note that quality is lacking in their room, leading to some very strong words

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Singer Marilyn and her mum Agnes host the second visit of the week at Bogenraith House in Aberdeenshire where theyre hoping to hit the high notes, but Dean and Chelsie are in an unforgiving mood after their feedback

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Pamela hosts the third visit of the week at Cairngorms Glamping in Aberdeenshire where most of her guests are tickled pink by the pods but one pair arent happy campers

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final visit of the week is to the Lovat Hotel in Perth. Tension between the BandBers mounts during a visit to a museum, and the breakfast set-up confuses everyone and leaves Sharmin and Sarah with some difficult-to-swallow scores in their feedback

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Its a feisty old payment day after a week packed to the gills with gripes. The tension is almost tangible as the scores are revealed and the winner announced

programme.title: The Emergency Ward
programme.desc: Dr Jonathan fears that a father-of-two who fell off a ladder and smashed his leg through a window could lose his foot. Dr Sarah mentors emergency registrar Dr Daniel through the challenging case of a motorcyclist who crashed over the handlebars of his bike. Doctors Elyssia and Alex examine a 51-year-old woman who attempted a backflip on a trampoline but landed on her head

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: The documentary detailing the daily work of staff at St Georges Hospital in south-west London continues, this time highlighting the stories of patients who received support from loved ones when life became tough. Gerald, a 66-year-old lifeguard and polo club official is rushed into AandE, having sustained a serious head wound after a 10-foot fall. The friends and family of 55-year-old Beverly gather at the hospital when she is admitted with a broken leg after being hit by a car near her home, and Paul, a 39-year-old father-of-three, arrives in resus with a nasty cut to his right arm. Paul complains that he is unable to move his fingers, leading staff to believe be may have significant tendon or nerve damage that could leave him permanently unable to use his hand

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Surgeons must plan their next move carefully when Daisy, a 22-month-old girl, arrives at St Georges Hospital by air ambulance after being kicked in the head by a horse at her familys stables. Meanwhile, 54-year-old Mike, who has a form of medication-resistant epilepsy, arrives in minors with a bandage around his jaw after falling face-first onto the pavement. Plus, 100-year-old Florence, who was diagnosed with dementia three years earlier, and her daughter Frances arrive at the hospital when the former suffers what appears to be a stroke

programme.title: Supermarkets Unwrapped
programme.desc: The Food Unwrapped team take a deep dive into the nations favourite supermarket aisles. In this first episode, the team chill out in the freezer aisle. Jimmy Doherty investigates why theres more to frozen chips than just potatoes, Helen Lawal learns why frozen ready meals have best-before dates, Briony May Williams gets the inside scoop on soft-scoop ice cream, and Andi Oliver learns how to get the most out of your freezer at home

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon OBrien head to Worcestershire to meet mechanic Adrian. Simon restores an old, wrecked armchair into some punk-rock furniture

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon OBrien travel to Surrey to meet upcycler Rob, who has a range of sheds a few miles from Gatwick Airport

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: A quartet of BandB owners battle it out to decide which of their establishments provides the best value for money, beginning with luxury weight-loss and detox retreat Slimmeria in East Sussex. The guests worry about uncomfortable sleeping arrangements, the price of accommodation and the strict 9pm curfew - and the prospect of a dance-style workout only exacerbates their bad mood

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Jan and William Cheeseman, owners of five-star Gold-rated 38 St Giles in Norwich, try to impress their competitors. Unfortunately, poor breakfast presentation and complaints about noise from the street increase the tension between the couple as they strive for perfection

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Ann and Bill Clay play host at their four-star Bosvean House BandB in Bude, Cornwall. Diane and Max Seivewright query the establishments luxury description, while Galia Grainger complains about the lack of a sea view. However, the hosts hope an indulgent Cornish cream tea, a stick dance and a drink in their garden shed will succeed in winning over the guests

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Village bakers Diane and Max Seivewright, the owners of Ombersley BandB in Worcestershire, host the last round of the competition, but some guests are far from impressed with the rooms and food

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The BandB owners gather to find out who has won the competition. programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: University lecturer Amanda Sherratt is keen to impress as she hosts the first dinner party in Lincolnshire, joined by beetroot farmer Chris Moore, theatre student Jack Stone, retail manager Ali Roberts and fitness enthusiast Alex Coxon. Amanda takes a risk with her Japanese-themed evening, which includes a raw fish starter and sumo-wrestling for entertainment

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Retail manager Ali Roberts hosts the second dinner party in Lincolnshire, confident that her gourmet cuisine and elegant style will win her the £1,000 prize. However, one diners conversation threatens to cast a shadow over the evening

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Farmer Chris Moore hosts the third dinner party in Lincolnshire, where he plans to wow his guests with a beetroot-themed dinner. However, it is not just his obsession with the vegetable that surprises his diners, as they soon discover he has some hidden talents

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On day four in Lincolnshire, Jack Stone plans to win over his guests with a creative evening during which they will have the chance to make their own food, but the DIY pizzas dont go to plan. Meanwhile, an interesting outfit from Alex Coxon gets the attention of Chris Moore

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: A week of competitive dining in Lincolnshire concludes as proud Geordie Alex Coxon invites fellow contestants into her home, where she invites guests to sample dishes with names favouring her distinctive dialect. However, chaos in the kitchen hinders her chance of securing victory, and as the night draws to a close, the winner is announced

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contest begins at the Vale of Berkeley Guest House in Gloucestershire, where owners Harri and Claire Chiba hope to prove that their establishment offers the best value for money. However, two guests from rival BandBs have an issue with the no-frills toilet, and another places a tricky request for anaemic toast at the breakfast table

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition moves to Artist Residence in Penzance, Cornwall, where proprietors Justin and Charlie hope to impress their rivals with a pottery class. However, one pair decide their room is too modern for their tastes, a duo are shocked to find hair in a shower filter and one guest seems underwhelmed by breakfast

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Third to host are Alec and Craig Coleman, who open the doors to the Edenfield Guest House in Blackpool and invite their fellow BandB owners to rate their establishment. However, on arrival one of the guests and his wife discover stains on the bedspread, while others feel the award-winning food is not up to scratch

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants travel to the New Inn, Portland, Dorset, for the fourth day of the competition, where hosts Stacey and Spencer Cullum introduce their guests to a typical island activity - sandcastle building. Meanwhile, Claire Chiba quizzes Stacey about her breakfast hamper and says she is alienating customers, before Harri Chiba tells Justin that his BandB is too manufactured

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The four sets of owners meet one last time to discover how much their rivals thought they should receive and to settle some scores. Two contestants attempt to explain away their negative feedback, and one contender finds herself unable to hold back her frustration, before the winner of the competition is revealed

programme.title: Location, Location, Location

First, Phil revisits civil partners Jo and Ally, who were house hunting in south London for a home big enough for three. He also meets back up with Steve and Jo, who searched for a family home in Cardiff in 2015

programme.title: Kirstie and Phils Love It or List It

Supply teacher Sue has waited 35 years for builder husband Roy to finish their renovation and would rather they move so they can enjoy their retirement. But he loves the space their house offers and doesnt think it can be replicated elsewhere

programme.title: Our Farm Next Door: Amanda, Clive and Kids
programme.desc: A major snowfall brings stunning landscapes and carefree play days for the kids, while builder Richard is hard at work fitting floors, pipes and electrics. Amandas off-roader gets stuck in a snowdrift and needs a helping hand from Miles and his tractor, and the family battle members to protect their pregnant sheep scattered across the Fells

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Nineteen-year-old motorcyclist Sam is airlifted to St Georges after crashing into a bus and being thrown under a car. He is placed in an induced coma and CT scans reveal Sam has bruising to his lungs, a ruptured kidney, a broken thigh bone and a fractured spine. The priority of the medics is is to stop his internal bleeding, while Sams parents are rushed to the hospital by police. Meanwhile, seven-year-old Raheem arrives in AandE with his dad Dennis after cutting his wrist while playing at home, and 59-year-old Therese turns up with a painful lump on her finger

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Ninety-one-year-old Cyril is airlifted to hospital after a car crash which required him to be cut from his car. Meanwhile, the medical team treat 57-year-old Caroline, who arrives at St Georges with chest pains, plus five-year-old Roman has a pencil stuck in his ear

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: A man suffers multiple injuries after a quad-bike accident on a farm near Penrith. Reported anaphylaxis following a bee sting has the heli-medics racing to the aid of Melody. Plus, cyclist Vivienne is in a bad way after her bike leaves the road on the notoriously steep Wrynose Pass in Cumbria

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Surgeons must plan their next move carefully when Daisy, a 22-month-old girl, arrives at St Georges Hospital by air ambulance after being kicked in the head by a horse at her familys stables. Meanwhile, 54-year-old Mike, who has a form of medication-resistant epilepsy, arrives in minors with a bandage around his jaw after falling face-first onto the pavement. Plus, 100-year-old Florence, who was diagnosed with dementia three years earlier, and her daughter Frances arrive at the hospital when the former suffers what appears to be a stroke

programme.title: Supermarkets Unwrapped
programme.sub-title: Supermarkets Unwrapped: Fruit and Veg Aisle
programme.desc: The team take their trolleys down the fruit and veg aisle. Kate Quilton is in Kenya to see how summer vegetables get to British supermarkets in the thick of winter. Jimmy Doherty looks at the measures taken to transport bananas across the UK, John Whaite finds out why supermarket blackberries are so big, Helen Lawal investigates a robot berry-picker in Portugal, and Matt Tebbutt finds out how we can waste less fruit and veg

programme.title: The Emergency Ward
programme.desc: Dr Jonathan fears that a father-of-two who fell off a ladder and smashed his leg through a window could lose his foot. Dr Sarah mentors emergency registrar Dr Daniel through the challenging case of a motorcyclist who crashed over the handlebars of his bike. Doctors Elyssia and Alex examine a 51-year-old woman who attempted a backflip on a trampoline but landed on her head

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Junior doctor Simon is concerned 40-year-old doorman Alfred, who was stabbed multiple times outside the social club where he works, may have internal injuries. Eighteen-year-old student George is brought into resus with blood coming from his ear and behaving erratically, following a fight at a party, and is sent for an urgent scan when consultant Phil becomes worried he may have a life-threatening bleed on his brain

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: The emergency room documentary continues, highlighting the stories of people facing adversity head-on. Erin, a 61-year-old former cancer patient with an ear infection, is rushed to St Georges Hospital after she collapsed at home. Doctors fear the condition may have spread to her brain, and send her for a CT scan to find out more. Tony, a 70-year-old part-time DJ, arrives in AandE after being involved in a high-speed bicycle accident while training for a 100-mile charity bike ride, and Charlie, a 39-year-old cabin crew worker, turns up at the hospital complaining of unbearable pain after discharging himself during a previous visit, and removing the cast fitted to support his broken arm

programme.title: Supermarkets Unwrapped
programme.desc: The team head for the Vegan Aisle for all the news on animal-free food. Helen Lawal visits Tesco to find out how they keep up with all the plant-based burger trend, John Whaite seeks out the secret to the snap in a vegan sausage skin, Kate Quilton finds out how exactly you milk an oat, and Briony May Williams learns how to make a quiche without egg

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: National Heritage worker Gillian Sutherland hosts the first dinner party in Inverness, and has high hopes that her guests - emergency-call handler Melissa Kirby, property tycoon David Edes, hair stylist Zarina Ainslie and personal fitness trainer Jamie Tulloch - will appreciate her traditional Scottish menu

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Designer-label fan Melissa Kirby hosts the second dinner party in Inverness, hoping her cooking lessons from one of the citys best chefs will win her the £1,000 prize. However, rival Gillian is unimpressed when she finds out the chef also made the gravy

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Property tycoon and teetotaller David Edes hosts a nautical evening for the third dinner party in Inverness, where his menu of basic but wholesome food makes his guests wary. A night of suspicion and hilarity between the diners ensues

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the fourth night of the contest in Inverness, it is hairdresser Zarina Ainslies turn to host. The fun-loving hopeful needs to live up to her lofty claims of being an amazing cook as her fellow contestants prepare to rate her on the evening

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Former professional footballer Jamie Tulloch hosts the final party in Inverness, going to the trouble of ensuring all the ingredients in his chosen dishes are locally sourced. However, it remains to be seen whether his home-grown approach to fine dining will be enough to impress his discerning fellow competitors, and as the night draws to a close, the weeks winner is revealed

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Diane and Gary are looking for an accessible holiday home with a pool in the all-year-round sunshine of Paphos on Cyprus. With three adult children and the recent arrival of their first grandchild, the couple cant wait to have all the family to stay, creating many years of happy memories together. Laura Hamilton sets out to find a property that keeps everyone happy on their budget of £130,000

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Gordon and Staci are singers from Glasgow, and it was their mutual love of music that brought them together 22 years ago. Now, with their children all grown up, theyre hoping to escape their hectic schedules back home and find their perfect holiday home in western Tenerife. With a budget of £170,000, can Lee Juggurnauth deliver their dream with any of the five fantastic properties hes found?

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Jean Johansson helps Ryan and Steve who want to buy a holiday home on the island of Gran Canaria. Their favourite resort is Maspalomas with its great beaches, shopping and nightlife. For their budget of £150,000, Jean shows them five properties to coinsider

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Retired GP surgery manager Suzie is looking for a holiday home for her and her husband Ram, on Spains Costa del Sol. Shes brings along her son Rishi to help her with the search. Laura Hamilton helps out, assessing what she can acquire with her £250,000 budget

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Craig Rowe meets teacher Kirsty from Co Armagh, who is looking for a holiday home on the Canary Island of Lanzarote, showing her five properties within her budget of £120,000

programme.title: Kirstie and Phils Love It or List It
programme.desc: Heather and Tim from Lothianburn enlist the help of the hosts to see if they can improve the seven-acre property they live in or if they should start afresh somewhere else. With Tim hating the dysfunctional layout, lack of storage and inadequate space for working from home, Phil Spencer looks for a new place that ticks all the boxes. Heather however loves their home and isnt ready to leave considering the work and money theyve put into making it theirs. She asks Kirstie Allsopp for help renovating, certain she can bring back the joy the couple once felt there

programme.title: George Clarkes Remarkable Renovations
programme.desc: Marcus and Kathryn have lived in the same house for nearly 20 years and raised their three children there, but Marcus has always dreamt of renovating his parents railway goods shed. When developers bought the land surrounding the building from his parents, he knew it was now or never

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition kicks off at Blackfriars in Inverness. After an afternoon of crafting, two guests note that quality is lacking in their room, leading to some very strong words

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Singer Marilyn and her mum Agnes host the second visit of the week at Bogenraith House in Aberdeenshire where theyre hoping to hit the high notes, but Dean and Chelsie are in an unforgiving mood after their feedback

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Pamela hosts the third visit of the week at Cairngorms Glamping in Aberdeenshire where most of her guests are tickled pink by the pods but one pair arent happy campers

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final visit of the week is to the Lovat Hotel in Perth. Sharmin and Sarah are used to tackling big jobs at their expansive 35-room hostelry, but one of their guests finds fault with the facilities. Tension between the BandBers mounts during a visit to a museum, and the breakfast set-up confuses everyone and leaves Sharmin and Sarah with some difficult-to-swallow scores in their feedback

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Its a feisty old payment day after a week packed to the gills with gripes. The tension is almost tangible as the scores are revealed and the winner announced

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: The documentary detailing the daily work of staff at St Georges Hospital in south-west London continues, this time highlighting the stories of patients who received support from loved ones when life became tough. Gerald, a 66-year-old lifeguard and polo club official is rushed into AandE, having sustained a serious head wound after a 10-foot fall. The friends and family of 55-year-old Beverly gather at the hospital when she is admitted with a broken leg after being hit by a car near her home, and Paul, a 39-year-old father-of-three, arrives in resus with a nasty cut to his right arm. Paul complains that he is unable to move his fingers, leading staff to believe be may have significant tendon or nerve damage that could leave him permanently unable to use his hand

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: The 100th episode of the series focuses on the love between patients and their nearest and dearest. Sir John Cockburn, whos 89, arrives at St Georges with acute abdominal pain and medics think it could be an abdominal aortic aneurysm and he faces emergency surgery. Meanwhile, 68-year-old Mick and his wife Linda have been involved in a head-on car crash. Mick took the brunt of the impact and has multiple injuries from top to toe that could be life-changing. The couple fell in love after leaving previous relationships, making a happy life together in their mobile home. And 10-year-old Niall is brought to AandE after falling 8ft from a tree on a family picnic. Hes broken his arm so badly it looks like a banana, and orthopaedic doctors need to work out how to get it back in place

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: A quartet of BandB owners battle it out to decide which of their establishments provides the best value for money, beginning with luxury weight-loss and detox retreat Slimmeria in East Sussex. programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.desc: University lecturer Amanda Sherratt is keen to impress as she hosts the first dinner party in Lincolnshire, joined by beetroot farmer Chris Moore, theatre student Jack Stone, retail manager Ali Roberts and fitness enthusiast Alex Coxon. programme.desc: Retail manager Ali Roberts hosts the second dinner party in Lincolnshire, confident that her gourmet cuisine and elegant style will win her the £1,000 prize. However, one diners conversation threatens to cast a shadow over the evening

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On day four in Lincolnshire, Jack Stone plans to win over his guests with a creative evening during which they will have the chance to make their own food, but the DIY pizzas dont go to plan. Meanwhile, an interesting outfit from Alex Coxon gets the attention of Chris Moore

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Lost Cities of Rome
programme.desc: Rome created the largest empire in the ancient world - its armies, organisation and building innovation created a vast territory linked by roads. Many of these cities lie in ruins today, others are buried and many others are forgotten. As this documentary reveals, they include Leptis Magna, Volubilis, Tipasa and Timgad in North Africa and Baalbek, Jerash, Palmyra and Apamea in the Middle East

programme.title: Grand Tours of the Scottish Islands
programme.desc: Paul Murton explores the Isle of Mull and its satellite islands to discover why they have become boltholes from the hustle and bustle of the modern world. He begins on the tidal island of Erraid, which inspired famous Scottish writer Robert Louis Stevenson, then hops over to Ulva, the final resting place of Lachlan MacQuarrie, one of the first governors of New South Wales. He then explores Mull itself, being given a whistlestop tour of the island by rally driver Louise Thomas, then travels to the mysterious little island of Inch Kenneth, where he hears the story of Nazi sympathizer Unity Mitford. He ends his tour at the remote Treshnish Islands, where he experiences a spot of puffin therapy

programme.title: Grand Tours of the Scottish Islands
programme.desc: Paul Murton visits Gigha and Jura, two islands of the Inner Hebrides that are only a few miles apart but could not be more different. He begins at the Achamore Gardens on Gigha, which were created in the 1930s by the malted-drink millionaire James Horlick. He loved Gighas mild climate so much that he bought the island and made it his home. Today Gigha is owned by the community, and many of its residents are incomers attracted by the opportunity to begin a new island life on this small and fertile place. Where Gigha is small, lush and verdant, Jura is rugged and awe-inspiring. Despite being one of Scotlands largest islands, just 200 people live there - alongside more than 5,000 deer

programme.title: Impossible Peace

programme.title: Impossible Peace
