programme.title: 1945: The Savage Peace
programme.desc: Documentary examining stories of brutal acts of violence in the aftermath of the Second World War. Many citizens of the countries that had previously been occupied by the Nazis sought to take revenge by committing atrocities against German or German-born civilians who had lived peacefully alongside them prior to the war. Featuring contributions from survivors of these incidents and eyewitnesses

programme.title: Cheating Hitler: Surviving the Holocaust
programme.desc: Three Canadian Holocaust survivors journey to home towns, killing sites, archives and hiding places in search of clues to unanswered questions from their pasts. Maxwell wonders what happened to a baby he saved in a forest in 1943, Helen wants to know more about the fate of her brother, while Rose is retracing the final steps of the woman who saved her life. The survivors came of age during the Holocaust and carry the burden of knowing they are the last living link to it

programme.desc: John Creedon delves into the theme of unity and the role music plays in connecting people during times of struggle and triumph. programme.desc: The revival sitcom spin-off from Cheers welcomes back uptight radio psychiatrist Frasier Crane (Kelsey Grammer) to Boston for 10 more episodes of familial strife with his son Freddy (Jack Cutmore-Scott) and nephew David (Anders Keith). During the second season, Frasier returns to his old stomping ground at KACL radio station in Seattle. Across the restaurant, retired business owner Garry is paired with glamorous divorcee Elizabeth, bubbly Amelia meets door-to-door salesman and serial extrovert Chris, and self-confessed daddys girl Eilish meets tractor-obsessed Adam, who bond over their shared love of machinery

programme.title: Bad Nanny
programme.desc: The first of a two-part documentary telling the story of Samantha Cookes - serial fraudster, master manipulator and, at one point, a trusted nanny. The film reveals one of her most brazen personas - Carrie Jade Williams, a supposedly terminally ill, award-winning author - which she used to scam her way across the UK and Ireland. programme.desc: Twenty years after modern civilisation has been destroyed, a hardened survivor is hired to smuggle a 14-year-old girl out of an oppressive quarantine zone. What starts as a small job soon becomes a brutal, heartbreaking journey, as they both must traverse the US and depend on each other for survival. Starring Pedro Pascal and Bella Ramsey

programme.title: Euphoria
programme.desc: Drama offering a look at the complexities of life in a social-media obsessed world, starring Zendaya

programme.title: Homicide: Life on the Street
programme.desc: Bayliss and Pembleton are called in to investigate the facts surrounding the death of a phone-sex operator. Gritty police drama, starring Andre Braugher, Daniel Baldwin and Richard Belzer

programme.title: Homicide: Life on the Street
programme.desc: The team investigates the baffling death of a good Samaritan found wearing nothing but a pair of white gloves. Police drama, starring Daniel Baldwin, Ned Beatty and Richard Belzer

programme.title: The Guest Wing
programme.desc: The Penningtons, owners of Muncaster Castle in the Lake District, discuss the challenges of housing three generations of their family under one roof, while elderly patriarch Patrick struggles to find new purpose following the death of his wife. At Maunsel House in Somerset, Sir Benjamin Slades preconceptions are challenged when a gay mens choir arrives for a weekend break

programme.title: Fish Town
programme.desc: Brixham residents raise money for a statue to commemorate fishermen lost at sea, but Pat Seddons plan to support the cause by participating in a fundraising skydive worries her friends and relatives. Jan Hart goes trawling for scallops, and shares some ancient superstitions

programme.title: Fish Town
programme.desc: Pat Seddon considers selling up and visits a clairvoyant, while celebrity chef Mitch Tonks makes an appearance at Brixhams Crab Festival

programme.title: Homicide: Life on the Street
programme.desc: Crosetti is found dead, the victim of what is tentatively ruled suicide - but Lewis refuses to accept the official version of events and sets about investigating the case for himself. Gritty police drama, starring Clark Johnson, Daniel Baldwin and Ned Beatty

programme.title: Homicide: Life on the Street
programme.desc: Kay decides to return to her home town for a break, but soon finds herself investigating a murder. Gritty police drama, starring Melissa Leo

programme.title: Deadwood
programme.desc: Alma proposes opening a bank and an angry claim owner seeks revenge on Bullock, while Wolcotts inner demons threaten to jeopardise his alliance with Tolliver as the next phase of their arrangement gets under way. Drama, starring Molly Parker, Powers Boothe and Timothy Olyphant

programme.title: Deadwood
programme.desc: Wolcott continues to make enemies for himself in the town, leading the camps leaders to call a meeting after a public brawl with Utter. Meanwhile, Swearengen has disturbing news for Alma Garrett - but she is unsure whether she can trust him. Drama, starring Garret Dillahunt, Molly Parker and Ian McShane

programme.title: Billions
programme.desc: Axe assembles a war room in the Hamptons following a disastrous setback, and seeks counsel on how to recoup his losses. Drama, starring Damian Lewis

programme.title: Billions
programme.desc: Axe investigates who was behind the breakdown in his Sandicot dealings, but faces formidable opposition. Chuck digs up dirt on a political rival, while Lara makes a PR trip to Sandicot to ease tensions between the town and the Axelrods. Wendy helps Taylor solve a problem at Axe Capital, and Chuck and Senior curry favour with a powerful ally

programme.title: My Brilliant Friend
programme.desc: Elenas relationship is threatened when Antonio discovers she has asked for the Solaras help, and Lila remains rebellious in her marriage to Stefano. In Italian

programme.title: Hacks
programme.desc: Deborah stops at nothing to get Ava removed from the head writer position at Late Night, while Marcus prepares for a difficult conversation

programme.title: Hacks
programme.desc: After their magazine feature is published, Ava feels even more stymied at work, while Deborah finds herself at odds with everything and everyone. Meanwhile, Kayla and Jimmy struggle with opening their new management company.

programme.title: The Last of Us
programme.desc: After escaping the QZ, Joel and Tess clash over Ellies fate while navigating the ruins of Boston on their way to drop the teenager off with a group of Fireflies

programme.title: Chernobyl
programme.desc: In April 1986, workers and firefighters put their lives on the line to try to deal with an explosion at the Chernobyl nuclear power plant near the city of Pripyat in Ukraine. Fact-based drama, starring Jared Harris, Emily Watson and Stellan Skarsgard

programme.title: Euphoria
programme.desc: Drama offering a look at the complexities of life in a social-media obsessed world, starring Zendaya

programme.title: All Her Fault
programme.desc: Reeling from the home invasion, Marissa tries to learn the truth. As Peter comes clean, she must decide how to protect the family

programme.title: The Last of Us
programme.desc: Joel and Ellie continue with their journey to Wyoming, but end up drawing the attention of a vindictive rebel leader while driving through Kansas City

programme.title: The Last of Us
programme.desc: After escaping the QZ, Joel and Tess clash over Ellies fate while navigating the ruins of Boston on their way to drop the teenager off with a group of Fireflies

programme.title: Homicide: Life on the Street
programme.desc: The team investigates a shooting and uncovers links to a cocaine cartel. Beau tries to discover his wifes whereabouts, while Bayliss reacts badly to being jilted by his girlfriend, and has to be rescued from the consequences of his own anger. Gritty police drama, starring Daniel Baldwin, Ned Beatty and Richard Belzer

programme.title: Homicide: Life on the Street
programme.desc: Crosetti is found dead, the victim of what is tentatively ruled suicide - but Lewis refuses to accept the official version of events and sets about investigating the case for himself. Gritty police drama, starring Clark Johnson, Daniel Baldwin and Ned Beatty

programme.title: Sharp Corner (2024)
programme.desc: Josh McCall is a family man who becomes obsessed with saving the lives of the car accident victims on the sharp corner in front of his house. Its an obsession that could cost him everything. Writer/director Jason Buxtons thriller, starring Ben Foster, Cobie Smulders and Gavin Drea

programme.title: The Dry (2020)
programme.desc: Federal agent Aaron Falk returns to his drought-stricken home town after an absence of more than 20 years to attend the funeral of his childhood friend. But his arrival opens up a decades-old wound - the unsolved death of a teenage girl. Crime drama, starring Eric Bana and Genevieve OReilly

programme.title: Wallace and Gromit in The Curse of the Were-Rabbit (2005)
programme.desc: Inventor Wallace and his canine sidekick Gromit have set up a pest-control service, and are called in to stop rabbits overrunning a garden show. However, the pair are overwhelmed when a destructive giant bunny arrives on the scene, while an interfering aristocrat contrives to make matters worse. Nick Parks Oscar-winning animated adventure, with the voices of Peter Sallis, Ralph Fiennes and Helena Bonham Carter

programme.title: Grow (2025)
programme.desc: Rivals pull every trick in the book to win a pumpkin-growing contest, but it remains to be seen whether farmer Dinah Little and her talented niece, Charlie, will come out on top. Comedy, starring Nick Frost, Golda Rosheuvel and Priya-Rose Brookwell

programme.title: Spy Kids (2001)
programme.desc: A megalomaniac threatens to take over the world, so two married spies come out of retirement to thwart his plans. However, when they go missing, it is up to their plucky children to step in and save the day. Family adventure directed by Robert Rodriguez, starring Antonio Banderas, Carla Gugino, Alan Cumming, Alexa Vega and Daryl Sabara

programme.title: Spider-Man: Homecoming (2017)
programme.desc: Peter Parker balances life as an ordinary high school student with his superhero alter-ego Spider-Man, while waiting in vain to join his mentor Iron Man on a world-saving mission. Determined to prove he is ready for bigger challenges, he investigates a spree of crimes committed with advanced weapons - leading him into a battle with a ruthless winged enemy on the hunt for priceless technology. Superhero adventure, starring Tom Holland, Michael Keaton and Robert Downey Jr

programme.title: Spider-Man: No Way Home (2021)
programme.desc: With the web-slingers identity now revealed to the world, Peter Parker asks Doctor Strange for magical help to undo the damage. However, a spell gone wrong unleashes dangerous foes from parallel universes on the world. Comic-book adventure sequel, starring Tom Holland, Zendaya and Benedict Cumberbatch, with Willem Dafoe, Jamie Foxx and Alfred Molina among the stars of past Spider-Man movies reprising their roles

programme.title: Jurassic Park (1993)
programme.desc: Scientists are given a sneak preview of a safari park inhabited by genetically engineered dinosaurs created by an eccentric tycoon. However, it all goes wrong when a greedy employee sabotages the security systems, allowing the prehistoric beasts to roam free and hunt the visitors. Steven Spielbergs action adventure, starring Sam Neill, Laura Dern, Jeff Goldblum, Richard Attenborough and Samuel L Jackson

programme.title: Men in Black (1997)
programme.desc: A streetwise cop is enlisted by a top-secret government force dedicated to policing alien visitors to Earth, teaming up with a veteran agent just as a body-swapping extraterrestrial giant insect begins a reign of terror throughout New York City. Sci-fi comedy, starring Will Smith, Tommy Lee Jones, Linda Fiorentino, Rip Torn and Vincent DOnofrio

programme.title: The Bourne Ultimatum (2007)
programme.desc: Amnesiac rogue assassin Jason Bournes long-buried memories are reawakened by a British journalist researching the secret organisation that was responsible for transforming him into a killing machine. Meanwhile, a ruthless CIA director becomes convinced Bourne is still a security risk, and plans to dispose of him once and for all. Third instalment of the spy thriller series, directed by Paul Greengrass and starring Matt Damon, Joan Allen, Julia Stiles, David Strathairn, Paddy Considine, Scott Glenn and Albert Finney

programme.title: 10 Cloverfield Lane (2016)
programme.desc: A woman survives a car crash, and wakes up to find herself in an underground bunker, belonging to a survivalist who claims that a devastating attack has left the outside world uninhabitable. As his behaviour becomes increasingly stranger, she begins to fear she is being tricked and resolves to discover the truth for herself. Thriller, starring Mary Elizabeth Winstead and John Goodman

programme.title: The Dry (2020)
programme.desc: Federal agent Aaron Falk returns to his drought-stricken home town after an absence of more than 20 years to attend the funeral of his childhood friend. But his arrival opens up a decades-old wound - the unsolved death of a teenage girl. Crime drama, starring Eric Bana and Genevieve OReilly

programme.title: Nightcrawler (2014)
programme.desc: A cynical petty crook is inspired when he sees a freelance camera crew, and decides to go into business filming crime scenes and accidents, then selling the footage to news broadcasters. His determination to stay ahead of the competition leads him down a dark path as his methods become increasingly ruthless. Crime drama, starring Jake Gyllenhaal, Rene Russo and Bill Paxton

programme.title: Mass (2021)
programme.desc: Years after an unspeakable tragedy tore their lives apart, two sets of grieving parents agree to talk privately about what happened, in an attempt to move forward. First-time director Fran Kranz drama, starring Jason Isaacs, Martha Plimpton, Reed Birney and Ann Dowd

programme.title: Sky Cinema Preview - April 2026
programme.desc: Previews of the films now playing on Sky Cinema, plus other highlights

programme.title: Sketch (2025)
programme.desc: When a young girls sketchbook slips into a mysterious pond, her drawings burst into life. As her once-quiet town spirals into chaos, she and her divided family must come together to track down the creatures they never meant to unleash. Writer/director Seth Worleys fantasy comedy, starring Tony Hale and DArcy Carden

programme.title: Spy Kids (2001)
programme.desc: A megalomaniac threatens to take over the world, so two married spies come out of retirement to thwart his plans. However, when they go missing, it is up to their plucky children to step in and save the day. Family adventure directed by Robert Rodriguez, starring Antonio Banderas, Carla Gugino, Alan Cumming, Alexa Vega and Daryl Sabara

programme.title: Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse (2018)
programme.desc: After being bitten by a radioactive arachnid, student Miles Morales develops incredible abilities, and becomes a version of Spider-Man. When a super collider device opens a gateway to other dimensions, Miles crosses paths with five counterparts to stop a threat for all realities. Oscar-winning animated adventure, with the voices of Shameik Moore and Nicolas Cage

programme.title: Men in Black (1997)
programme.desc: A streetwise cop is enlisted by a top-secret government force dedicated to policing alien visitors to Earth, teaming up with a veteran agent just as a body-swapping extraterrestrial giant insect begins a reign of terror throughout New York City. As her once-quiet town spirals into chaos, she and her divided family must come together to track down the creatures they never meant to unleash. Writer/director Seth Worleys fantasy comedy, starring Tony Hale and DArcy Carden

programme.title: Shazam! (2019)
programme.desc: Youngster Billy Batson is chosen by the ancient wizard Shazam as his new champion, and receives various superpowers. Together with his best friend Freddy Freeman, Billy must come to terms with his new talents in order to stop the evil Dr Thaddeus Sivana. Comedy adventure based on the Captain Marvel and Shazam comics, starring Zachary Levi, Mark Strong and Asher Angel

programme.title: Wonder Woman (2017)
programme.desc: An Amazon princess who grows up in enchanted realm has her first encounter with the outside world during the First World War. American airman Steve Trevor crash lands on her isolated island home. Determined to bring the chaos sweeping the world to an end, she ventures onto the front line in an attempt to bring down an ancient and powerful evil force that is driving the human race towards destruction. Director Patty Jenkins blockbusting fantasy adventure, starring Gal Gadot, Chris Pine and David Thewlis

programme.title: Arrival (2016)
programme.desc: The world is thrown into uproar when 12 alien spaceships arrive at locations around the globe. As tensions rise between nations and fear of the arrivals grows, a recently bereaved linguist is recruited by the US army to find a way to communicate with the aliens and discover why they have come. Sci-fi drama, starring Amy Adams, Jeremy Renner and Forest Whitaker

programme.title: Lake George (2024)
programme.desc: Two misfits embark on a road trip, take a dubious deal and find redemption amid shady circumstances. Crime thriller, starring Carrie Coon and Shea Wingham

programme.title: Iron Monkey (1993)
programme.desc: In a desperate and unjust land, where government corruption rules the day, only one man has the courage to challenge the system and fight back. Thriller, starring Rongguang Yu and Donnie Yen. In Cantonese

programme.title: Sky Cinema Preview - April 2026
programme.desc: Previews of the films now playing on Sky Cinema, plus other highlights

programme.title: Pillion (2025)
programme.desc: A directionless man is swept off his feet when an enigmatic biker takes him on as his submissive. Director Harry Lightons Bafta-nominated comedy, starring Alexander Skarsgard, Harry Melling and Douglas Hodge

programme.title: Blue Moon (2025)
programme.desc: Set over the course of one turbulent night in March 1943, Lorenz Hart, the waspish wordsmith responsible for The Lady Is a Tramp and My Funny Valentine, finds his life unravelling on the opening evening of his ex-partners show, Oklahoma! Director Richard Linklaters biographical comedy drama, starring Ethan Hawke, Margaret Qualley, Bobby Cannavale and Andrew Scott

programme.title: Hostages (2025)
programme.desc: After an explosion at a London hotel, three people are swept up in the chaos. As rumours circulate that the blast was a terrorist attack, their story gathers momentum on social media and across the rolling 24-hour news cycle. Writer/director Jim Owens comedy thriller, starring Charlotte Ritchie, Tanya Moodie and Nicholas Asbury

programme.title: The Bad Guys 2 (2025)
programme.desc: Struggling to adjust to their newly minted lives as Good Guys, the Bad Guys are offered one last job by a group of all-female criminals. Animated sequel, featuring the voices of Sam Rockwell, Marc Maron and Craig Robinson

programme.title: A Big Bold Beautiful Journey (2025)
programme.desc: New York bachelor David is due to drive to his friends wedding, but a wheel clamp on his vehicle derails those plans. He acquires a new drive from the mysterious Car Rental Company managed by two nameless agents, who are oddly familiar with his dating history. At the wedding, David meets fellow singleton Sarah and squanders an opportunity to dance with her. On the way home, the rental cars GPS asks him if he would like to embark on a big bold beautiful journey. When David agrees, the virtual assistant guides him to Sarah and they follow a winding route between physical doors that open into episodes from their respective pasts. Romantic drama, starring Colin Farrell and Margot Robbie

programme.title: Superman (2025)
programme.desc: Kal-El, one of the last survivors of the planet Krypton, attempts to protect the people of Earth from evil genius Lex Luthor. Superman is assisted by the Justice Gang, comprising Guy Gardner, aka Green Lantern, Kendra Saunders, aka Hawkgirl, Michael Holt, aka Mister Terrific and Rex Mason, aka Metamorpho. Writer/director James Gunns fantasy adventure, starring David Corenswet, Rachel Brosnahan and Nicholas Hoult

programme.title: One Battle After Another (2025)
programme.desc: Bob is a washed-up revolutionary who lives in a state of stoned paranoia, with his spirited and self-reliant daughter, Willa. When his evil nemesis resurfaces and Willa goes missing, he scrambles to find her as both battle the consequences of their pasts. Paul Thomas Andersons action thriller loosely based on Thomas Pynchons novel Vineland, starring Leonardo DiCaprio, Sean Penn and Benicio del Toro

programme.title: Roofman (2025)
programme.desc: Former US Army Reserve officer Jeffrey Manchester executes a plan to rob multiple branches of McDonalds. He is eventually captured by police and becomes the first person to escape from Brown Creek Correctional Institution in North Carolina. Jeffrey hides out at a toy shop for several months, and during forays outside the building, he sparks romance with store worker Leigh Wainscott. Comedy drama, starring Channing Tatum, Kirsten Dunst and Peter Dinklage

programme.title: Superman (2025)
programme.desc: Kal-El, one of the last survivors of the planet Krypton, attempts to protect the people of Earth from evil genius Lex Luthor. programme.title: Weapons (2025)
programme.desc: At 2.17am, 17 children from the class of Justine Gandy run into the night, arms outstretched, never to be seen again. The only child from the class who remains safely in their bed is Alex Lilly. Distraught parent Archer Graff joins other members of the local community in pointing a finger of blame at Ms Gandy for the shocking turn of events. While she pleads innocence, school principal Andrew Marcus seeks answers along with police officer Paul Morgan. Horror, starring Julia Garner, Josh Brolin and Alden Ehrenreich

programme.title: Pillion (2025)
programme.desc: A directionless man is swept off his feet when an enigmatic biker takes him on as his submissive. Director Harry Lightons Bafta-nominated comedy, starring Alexander Skarsgard, Harry Melling and Douglas Hodge

programme.title: Caught Stealing (2025)
programme.desc: Former baseball player Henry Hank Thompson foolishly agrees to cat-sit for British neighbour Russ, and walks unwittingly into the middle of a turf war between warring factions. Director Darren Aronofskys comedy thriller, starring Austin Butler, Zoe Kravitz and Matt Smith

programme.title: Murdered at First Sight
programme.desc: The shocking case of a woman stabbed more than 70 times by a teenager who who researched murder and serial killers on the internet

programme.title: Killing Mum and Dad
programme.desc: Crime documentary investigating cases of couples murdered by their own children. The first episode focuses on Stephen Seddon, who tried to kill his parents in a fake crash, but was then hailed as a hero for saving them. But his evil intentions hadnt got him anywhere

programme.title: How I Caught the Killer
programme.desc: Detectives look back on the case of Elijah Butler, murdered four days after he married his wife - by her long-term stalker

programme.title: The Real Manhunter
programme.desc: Colin Sutton looks back at the murder of an 18-year-old, and how the young killers who took turns to kick his head and body were caught

programme.title: Highway Patrol
programme.desc: Following Australias traffic enforcers as they deal with high-speed chases, defiant hooligans and explosive crashes

programme.title: Highway Patrol
programme.desc: Following Australias traffic enforcers as they deal with high-speed chases, defiant hooligans and explosive crashes

programme.title: Brit Cops
programme.desc: The City of London Police tackle crime on the streets of the capital, focusing on the theft of motorbikes

programme.title: A1: Britains Longest Road
programme.desc: Police rush to the rescue after a caravan overturns on the A1, while traffic officers hurry to deal with two vehicles abandoned in dangerous spots

programme.title: A1: Britains Longest Road
programme.desc: Traffic officers are called out to help a motorist stranded in freezing conditions, and a driver is caught red-handed using her mobile phone behind the wheel

programme.title: A1: Britains Longest Road
programme.desc: An accident leaves a biker fighting for his life, and officers track down pedestrians taking a dangerous path along the carriageway. A crash leaves a driver with worrying injuries

programme.title: Caught on Dashcam
programme.desc: A countdown of the most incredible, hilarious and spectacular real-life crashes in the world - all caught on dashcam

programme.title: Send in the Dogs
programme.desc: Sgt Midgley tries to qualify as a dog handler after 24 years on the force but 14-month-old springer spaniel Ruby puts both their futures in jeopardy. The Greater Manchester Police dog squad remembers a close call with football fans during the 2008 Uefa Cup Final, and the 55-strong team deals with a siege involving a man with a knife, who is threatening to kill his family. Narrated by Ken Stott

programme.title: How I Caught the Killer
programme.desc: How detective David Baker became the first person to use DNA profiling in a criminal investigation, when looking for the killer of two young girls in 1986

programme.title: Forensics: Catching the Killer
programme.sub-title: The Mum Who Never Came Home

programme.desc: The infamous Beer Hall Putsch of November 1923, an attempt by Adolf Hitler to take power in Germany by force. Though it failed, it was a day that would change the world for ever, birthing Hitlers regime

programme.title: The Abyss: Rise and Fall of the Nazis
programme.desc: A fresh look at the Third Reich from a global and current perspective, telling how the Nazis conquered Germany and then half of Europe within a few years of losing the First World War. The survivors and the winners from the war wanted to blame the Germans. No one knew whether the Germans had really broken with the Nazis

programme.sub-title: The Jericho Head, The Cloudbuster and the Map
programme.desc: Perplexing historical objects include the Jericho Head, a 9,000-year-old clay-covered artifact. Plus, a 1950s machine built to control the weather and a map that could be the oldest ever found

programme.title: Historys Greatest Aircraft

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.sub-title: East: Stone Age Engineering and Battle of Bullecourt
programme.desc: Alice Roberts investigates the best archaeological discoveries of 2018 from the East of the UK, including an ancient lost monument as old as Stonehenge uncovered in Suffolk, a dig at the site of Britains first tank battle, and a coin hoard that offers an insight into the effect the English civil war had on the lives of ordinary people

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.desc: Alice Roberts shares the best archaeological discoveries of 2018, starting with the North of the UK and a preserved prehistoric village at the black Loch in Myrton. The programme also follows archaeologists uncovering a previously unknown Anglo-Saxon cemetery in Lincolnshire, and a major regeneration project in Salford, unearthing the largest jail in Georgian England. Cameras join the hunt for a lost Second World War reconnaissance Spitfire in Norway and enjoy privileged access to the conservation labs at Vindolanda Roman fort to see what really happens when the digging stops

Away from prying eyes, the Nazis also established a concentration camp - the only one on British soil - amid the idyllic scenery of woodlands and silver sand beaches

programme.title: Hitlers British Island

programme.title: Digging for Britain

programme.title: Digging for Britain

programme.desc: Tori Herridge and a team of scientists investigate when the remains of a young woman from the Bronze Age are found during routine roadworks on the A9 in Scotland. In her grave are clues to who she might have been, including a finely made beaker. Does she belong to the so-called Beaker People, who migrated from Europe to Britain more than 4,000 years ago?

programme.title: Ross Kemp: Shipwreck Treasure Hunter
programme.desc: To take on the deepest wrecks in Scapa Flow, Ross needs to successfully navigate decompression training before heading out with local dive guide Emily Turton to dive on one of the biggest of the Kaiser?s Imperial war ships from the First World War, SMS Karlsruhe. As he explores the eerie relic, Ross tries to understand how and why the German fleet ended up on the Scottish seabed, when they had already surrendered months earlier. Having resolved one enduring mystery, he then heads 600 miles south to meet with ex-serviceman Mark Culwick and dive on an experimental British aircraft carrier submarine built in the 1920s called the M2. This unique vessel was lost in shocking circumstances, with all hands. During his dive Ross starts to understand the horrifying truth ofexactly how and why the 60 men on board never came home

Guarding the gateway to the Highlands, its battle-scarred walls have witnessed savagery and chivalry, intrigue, alchemy, adultery and murder. With the aid of location filming, aerial shots and dramatic reconstructions, Dan Jones examines the history of this stronghold and relates the stories of some of the powerful characters who have owned it over the centuries

programme.title: Secrets of Great British Castles

programme.desc: Centuries ago, canals were the liquid highways of Britain, transporting raw materials and finished goods all over the country. programme.desc: Raksha Dave and Alex Langlands examine the history of HMS Invincible, which was captured from the French in 1747 and helped transform the Royal Navy with the lessons it taught about organisation and ship design. programme.title: Walking Through History
programme.desc: It was 30 years after the Romans invaded Britain that they were ready to take on the challenge of conquering the Lake District. With the toughest landscape they had encountered in the nation, peopled by a rebellious tribe, it was no small task, but within a few years, the whole of Lakeland was under their control. Tony Robinson tackles the journey by himself, walking 50 miles from Penrith to Ambleside and on to the Irish Sea at Ravenglass, discovering that the Romans encountered beauty and danger in equal measure

programme.title: Walking Through History
programme.desc: Tony Robinson takes a four-day trek along the coastline between Plymouth in Devon and Falmouth, learning about the thriving smuggling trade in Cornwall during the late 18th century. The areas tiny secretive harbours, beaches and secluded coves were ideal for illicit imports such as tobacco and brandy, and the business was so huge it threatened the national economy. Along his route, visiting such beauty spots as Lantic Bay and Polperro, he encounters all sorts of reminders of the trade and meets descendants of those involved

programme.title: David Attenboroughs Conquest of the Skies
programme.desc: The veteran naturalist examines the world of flight, travelling across the globe to chart the evolutionary story of those creatures who seemingly defy the rules of gravity by taking to the air. Initially focusing on insects, Attenborough meets a descendant of the dragonfly, before examining the Atlas beetle, which tends to restrict flight to times when it needs a mate or a fresh supply of food. More aesthetically pleasing is a group of beautiful tropical butterflies, followed by an in-depth study into the blow fly - the jet fighter of insects

programme.title: David Attenboroughs Conquest of the Skies
programme.desc: The veteran naturalist visits the jungles of Borneo to meet creatures that like to glide through life - the harlequin tree frog and the little-known colugo - often referred to, incorrectly, as a flying lemur. He also has a CGI-assisted encounter with the first true vertebrate flyer, the pterosaur, receives a flying lesson from a small flock of swans at Loch Lomond in Scotland and encounters the planets largest species of bat

programme.title: David Attenboroughs Conquest of the Skies
programme.desc: The veteran naturalist turns his attention to creatures that dominate the skies today. He begins with the vast bird family, watching a group of vultures as they go scavenging and some peregrine falcons dive bombing for their prey. He then moves on to the floating forests of Ecuador to find out what makes the humble hummingbird tick, before ending his journey at the Gomantong bat caves of Borneo - a place he first filmed in 1972 - witnessing a mass exodus of the creatures

programme.title: The Secret Garden (2020)
programme.desc: When a young girl is sent to live with her uncle on his remote country estate after her parents die, she discovers a magical garden. Director Marc Mundens adaptation of the classic Frances Hodgson Burnett tale, starring Colin Firth, Julie Walters and Dixie Egerickx

programme.desc: A gladiatorial fight for survival as the ocean recedes and sea animals of all kinds struggle between life and death in tide pools

programme.title: Age of the Big Cats
programme.desc: Three-part documentary telling the stories of the cheetah, the snow leopard and the jaguar, using night vision systems, super slow-motion cameras and 3D computer-generated imagery to unpack their extraordinary trajectory and witness their ascent to predator status

programme.title: Age of the Big Cats
programme.desc: The series unravels a story of world domination through the plight of the lion and the tiger. Travelling back in time, the documentary tells a story of adaptation and survival to reveal how lions conquered the world and the tiger became the real undisputed king of the jungle

programme.title: Age of the Big Cats
programme.desc: The stories of the puma and the leopard, following their evolution and adaptation through the Ice Age and unravelling a story that spans two million years of history

programme.title: Wild Philippines
programme.desc: Discovering a world shaped by fire and water, as cameras capture Philippine eagles soaring above ancient forests and rare crocodiles lurking below the rivers surface

programme.title: The Kimberley: Australias Wild West
programme.desc: Stepping into the wild and exploring Earths greatest savannah, cameras capture ancient fire traditions and a sugar gliders daring escape from the flames

programme.title: David Attenboroughs First Life
programme.desc: In the first of a two-part documentary, the naturalist explores the origins of life on Earth. Beginning the journey near his childhood home in Charnwood Forest, Leicestershire, he learns how a fossil discovery transformed scientists understanding of the evolution of complex organisms, and in Newfoundland and Australia he reveals the earliest kinds of animal to exist on the planet. With the help of cutting-edge technology and visual effects, the programme brings the creatures to life, demonstrating how they survived

programme.title: David Attenboroughs First Life
programme.desc: In the conclusion of the two-part documentary, the naturalist travels to Burgess Shale in Canadas Rocky Mountains, where he explores how evolution gained pace once creatures developed mouths and mobility. In Scotland, he reveals that one of the smallest fossils found holds the secret to how animals began surviving on dry land, and explains the bloom of life during the oxygen-rich Carboniferous period

programme.title: The Bachelor King
programme.desc: Documentary exploring the lives of king penguins, filmed on the sub-Antarctic island of South Georgia over five months. The programme imagines what one penguins life would be, following it during the challenging, awkward time between adolescence and adulthood. Presented by David Attenborough

programme.title: Wild Philippines
programme.desc: Discovering a world shaped by fire and water, as cameras capture Philippine eagles soaring above ancient forests and rare crocodiles lurking below the rivers surface

programme.title: Gangs of Baboon Falls
programme.desc: The fortunes of competing troops of baboons as they battle for territorial supremacy around the Victoria Falls on the border of Zimbabwe and Zambia. As lockdown continues, the streets of Victoria Falls are empty, and the gangs must find new ways to survive in a strangely changed world

programme.title: Animals Decoded
programme.desc: Communication in the animal world, beginning with the secrets of body language

programme.title: Animals Decoded
programme.desc: The remarkable ways that animals speak to one another, from the trumpeting of enormous elephants to the chatter of seal colonies

programme.title: Animals Decoded
programme.desc: Through sense, scent and sight, animals can communicate in ways that are outside of the reach of humans. Here, scientists dig further into their secrets

programme.title: Volcanic Odysseys
programme.desc: How volcanos have altered the planet. Volcanologist Tom Pfeiffer takes a group to Ertea Ale. However, first they need to cross Ethiopias Danakil Depression - one of the planets most inhospitable places

programme.title: Volcanic Odysseys
programme.desc: Volcanologist Tom Pfeiffer heads to Indonesia to see if Anak, a son of legendary volcano Krakatoa, is ready to repeat the pattern of its ancestor

programme.title: Volcanic Odysseys
programme.desc: Italys Mount Etna is one of the best places for volcano watchers. Volcanologist Tom Pfeiffer heads there in the hope of seeing a paroxysmal eruption

programme.title: Volcanic Odysseys
programme.desc: Geologist Phillip Ong finally has his chance to explore the Hawaiian volcano Kilauea after a collapse of the crater floor and a huge eruption drains its lava

programme.title: Undiscovered Vistas
programme.desc: The pine forests and underwater caves of the Bahamas, housing wildlife including green turtles and rock iguanas

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: Alison takes action to protect the park after learning that Covid-19 can also affect apes. Chimp Gypsys condition worsens and a little woolly bonds with his dad

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: Alison and the team welcome a new female loris to the park, and theres another tiny new addition at the woolly monkey house

programme.desc: An exploration of the Mesoamerican Reef, 40 miles north of Honduras - a pristine home for an abundance of amazing marine wildlife and lush vegetation

programme.title: Wild Dogs: Running with the Pack
programme.desc: Documentary following three wild dog packs for six weeks throughout the dry season in South Luangwa National Park in Zambia

programme.title: Wild Dogs: Running with the Pack
programme.desc: Drought ravages South Luangwa National Park in Zambia and as the Manzi pack encounter predators on their hunt for water, the Stork colony thrive against all odds

programme.title: Land of Primates

programme.title: Wildlife Icons

programme.title: The Hobbit: An Unexpected Journey (2012)
programme.desc: Unassuming hobbit Bilbo Baggins is pulled out of his comfortable life when Gandalf the wizard volunteers him for a dangerous quest. He joins a party of dwarves who are on a mission to reclaim their lost homeland, which has been taken over by a dragon. When the group journeys into the Misty Mountains, Bilbo becomes separated from the dwarves and falls into a cave, where he finds himself confronted by Gollum and forced to play a riddle game. It is set in Middle-earth 60 years before the events of The Lord of the Rings and is the first part of Peter Jacksons fantasy adventure trilogy based on JRR Tolkiens novel, starring Martin Freeman, Ian McKellen, Richard Armitage, James Nesbitt, Ken Stott, Cate Blanchett, Ian Holm and Christopher Lee

programme.title: The Hobbit: The Desolation of Smaug (2013)
programme.desc: The party of dwarves and their hobbit ally continue the quest to reclaim their lost kingdom, journeying through the forest home of ancestral enemy the elves and finally facing the dragon that drove them from their home. Meanwhile, Gandalf the wizard investigates the rise of Necromancer, a mysterious dark power residing in Dol Guldur with the ability to summon the spirits of the dead. Part two of Peter Jacksons fantasy adventure trilogy based on JRR Tolkiens novel, starring Martin Freeman, Ian McKellen, Richard Armitage and Orlando Bloom, with Luke Evans, Evangeline Lilly and Benedict Cumberbatch

programme.title: The Hobbit: The Battle of the Five Armies (2014)
programme.desc: Dwarf king Thorin reclaims control of his homeland, but his descent into madness places him on the brink of war with his human and elven allies. As Thorins Hobbit friend Bilbo tries to save the tormented ruler from himself, a vast horde of orcs gathers to destroy them all. Conclusion of the fantasy adventure trilogy, starring Martin Freeman, Richard Armitage, Ian McKellen, Luke Evans and Orlando Bloom

programme.title: The Lord of the Rings: The War of the Rohirrim (2024)
programme.desc: Helm Hammerhand sits on the throne of Rohan, flanked by sons Hama and Haleth and rebellious daughter Hera. Dunlending lord Freca proposes a marital union between Hera and his son Wulf, which Helm loudly rejects. In a subsequent brawl between fathers, Helm unintentionally lands a fatal blow, so Wulf vows revenge and amasses an army led by General Targg. Animated adventure, featuring the voices of Gaia Wise, Brian Cox, Luke Pasqualino and Lorraine Ashbourne

programme.title: The Cinema List: Sky Originals
programme.desc: Dive into a world of unmissable Sky Original films

programme.title: The Last Rifleman (2022)
programme.desc: Artie Crawford is a Second World War veteran who has just lost his wife. On the 75th anniversary of the D-Day landings in Normandy, Artie decides to secretly escape his Northern Ireland care home, and embarks on a journey to France to pay his final respects to his best friend. Drama, starring Pierce Brosnan and Jurgen Prochnow

programme.title: Empire of the Sun (1987)
programme.desc: An English boy living in Shanghai is separated from his parents during the Japanese invasion and forced to live on the streets. The youngster is befriended by an American sailor, who helps the boy adapt to life without his family, before the pair are eventually captured and subjected to the terrors of internment. Steven Spielbergs Second World War drama based on JG Ballards semi-autobiographical novel, starring Christian Bale, John Malkovich and Nigel Havers

programme.title: Der Kaiser (2022)
programme.desc: Biopic focusing on the life of German soccer player and manager Franz Beckenbauer, starring Klaus Steinbacher and Teresa Rizos. In German

programme.title: Nuremberg (2025)
programme.desc: A US Army psychiatrist is sent to assess high-ranking Nazi prisoners - most notably Hermann Goring - to decide if theyre fit for trial. As the Nuremberg trials begin, he becomes enmeshed in a psychological and legal battle. Director James Vanderbilts thriller, starring Russell Crowe, Rami Malek and Leo Woodall

programme.title: Amadeus (1984)
programme.desc: Composer Antonio Salieri is a favoured artist in the court of Austrian emperor Joseph II, but he finds himself pushed aside in favour of Mozart. Salieri admires the younger maestros music, but is incensed that someone so vulgar and obnoxious should be gifted with such talent. As jealousy consumes him, he plots his rivals downfall. Period drama, adapted by Peter Shaffer from his own play and starring F Murray Abraham and Tom Hulce

programme.title: Captain Phillips (2013)
programme.desc: An American cargo ship sets a dangerous course around the coast of Somalia, while inland, four men are pressed into service as pirates by the local warlords. The captain is taken hostage when the raiding party hijacks the vessel, resulting in a tense five-day crisis. Fact-based thriller, starring Tom Hanks and Barkhad Abdi

programme.title: The Post (2017)
programme.desc: In 1971, an American military analyst uncovers the depths of the US governments deceptions about the futility of the Vietnam War, and takes action by copying top-secret documents that would become the Pentagon Papers. Washington Post owner Kay Graham and her editor Ben Bradlee discover The New York Times is preparing an explosive expose on those papers and, determined to compete, set out to publish them first. Steven Spielbergs fact-based drama, starring Meryl Streep, Tom Hanks, Sarah Paulson and Bob Odenkirk

programme.title: The Last Rifleman (2022)
programme.desc: Artie Crawford is a Second World War veteran who has just lost his wife. On the 75th anniversary of the D-Day landings in Normandy, Artie decides to secretly escape his Northern Ireland care home, and embarks on a journey to France to pay his final respects to his best friend. Drama, starring Pierce Brosnan and Jurgen Prochnow

programme.title: Nuremberg (2025)
programme.desc: A US Army psychiatrist is sent to assess high-ranking Nazi prisoners - most notably Hermann Goring - to decide if theyre fit for trial. As the Nuremberg trials begin, he becomes enmeshed in a psychological and legal battle. Director James Vanderbilts thriller, starring Russell Crowe, Rami Malek and Leo Woodall

programme.title: Ferrari (2023)
programme.desc: During the summer of 1957, ex-racecar driver Enzo Ferrari is in crisis. Bankruptcy stalks the company he and his wife, Laura, built from nothing a decade earlier. Their tempestuous marriage struggles with the mourning for one son and the acknowledgement of another. Attempting to secure their survival, he rolls the dice on one race - 1,000 miles across Italy, the iconic Mille Miglia. Director Michael Manns drama, starring Adam Driver and Jack OConnell

programme.title: Amadeus (1984)
programme.desc: Composer Antonio Salieri is a favoured artist in the court of Austrian emperor Joseph II, but he finds himself pushed aside in favour of Mozart. Salieri admires the younger maestros music, but is incensed that someone so vulgar and obnoxious should be gifted with such talent. As jealousy consumes him, he plots his rivals downfall. Period drama, adapted by Peter Shaffer from his own play and starring F Murray Abraham and Tom Hulce

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: After experiencing disturbing visions, Nick discovers a fellow Grimm is torturing and murdering monsters that have harmed humans, spreading panic among the Wesen creatures. Renard and Juliettes connection moves to the next level. David Giuntoli stars

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: A Wesen puts a contract out on Monroe, but the individual approached for the job turns out to be his ex-girlfriend Angelina. Instead of accepting the $25,000 on offer, she unites with Nick to help her former partner avoid his fate. Silas Weir Mitchell stars

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: Nick and Hank investigate a murder, which leads them to a dangerously unstable fugitive on the run with his daughter. However, there may be an even greater threat close by

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: A high-school student is killed by a monster, leading Nick and Hank to suspect that a boy competing in an academic competition is trying to eliminate his rivals

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: Nick and Hank investigate when a child goes missing, uncovering several similar cases all linked by sightings of a mysterious ghostly presence. It transpires that the Weeping Woman - or La Llorona - is a ghost who kidnaps three children every Halloween and drowns them, hoping their sacrifice can atone for the loss of her own children, whom she also drowned. David Giuntoli stars

programme.title: Most Haunted
programme.desc: Yvette Fielding and Ian Lawman travel to Stoke-on-Trent, where they spend the night in Gladstone Pottery Museum, encountering sudden changes in temperature and flying objects

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: After ONeill and the team help relocate displaced aliens to a new homeworld, another civilisation tries to colonise the same planet, leaving the team striving to discover a fair solution to the dilemma. Sci-fi drama, starring Richard Dean Anderson and Amanda Tapping

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: ONeill, Carter, Daniel and Tealc are brainwashed, given new memories and put to work in the mines beneath an ice-covered planet, leaving General Hammond to face the possibility that his team is dead. Sci-fi drama, starring Richard Dean Anderson and Michael Shanks

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: The test flight of a Goauld death glider goes wrong, sending Tealc and ONeill hurtling through space, and leaving the crew at the SGC struggling to rescue them. Sci-fi adventure, starring Richard Dean Anderson, Christopher Judge and Michael Shanks

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Daniel investigates when one of his former professors dies in suspicious circumstances. Discovering the tutor was studying an ancient Egyptian Goauld symbiote, he faces a race against time to save the college from a terrible curse. Michael Shanks and Richard Dean Anderson star

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: A lieutenant is found murdered in his quarters, revealing a possible connection to a disturbing dream experienced by Ezri in which she encountered one of Daxs previous hosts. Sci-fi drama, starring Nicole de Boer and Avery Brooks

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: A Changeling with an aversion to humanoids forces Odo to reassess his life - sowing seeds of distrust on the station. Sci-fi adventure, starring Avery Brooks and Rene Auberjonois

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: The holosuite malfunctions, trapping DS9s senior staff in a Las Vegas crime caper, where they must save one of the characters from seemingly certain death. Sci-fi adventure, starring Avery Brooks and Rene Auberjonois

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Dr Bashir accepts a dangerous assignment while visiting Romulus and finds himself caught in the middle of a manipulative and murderous plot. Sci-fi adventure, starring Alexander Siddig and Avery Brooks

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Dax defies Siskos decision concerning Worf, but the captain is distracted as he realises his destiny is growing ever more confusing. Starring Avery Brooks and Nicole de Boer

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick and Shane decide they must execute Randall for the good of the other survivors, but Dale fears this would mean the group had finally lost its humanity, and pleads with them to spare his life. Hershel begins to bond with Glenn, and Carls emotional traumas leave him feeling increasingly cynical about the future. However, his actions have unintended consequences

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick decides the survivors need to change their mentality following their latest loss. However, his announcement infuriates Shane, who accuses him of neglecting the things that matter most - before secretly devising a plan of his own. Meanwhile, dangers lurk in the woods as winter draws nearer, and Carl faces a harsh truth about the future

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: When a mysterious case of sudden blindness results in a womans death, Nick and Hank encounter an insect-like Wesen that appears to feed off its bereaved victims tears. Meanwhile, Adalind weighs up the significance of her new situation, while Juliette continues to work with Rosalee in an effort to bring her memory back. Russell Hornsby and David Giuntoli star

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: Hank reflects on an arrest for murder he made of a man who claimed monsters were involved. With the mans death sentence approaching and the knowledge he has recently acquired from Nick, Hank begins to wonder if the mans absurd claims were true and that he may be innocent of the crime. Meanwhile, Monroe finds himself involved in a situation he never saw coming.

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: Adalind returns to avenge her mothers death, and blackmails Renard into helping her. Juliette confesses to Nick that she has feelings for another man

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: Nick finds out about Juliettes relationship with Renard - who is frantically searching for the key - and can barely control the urge for revenge. Monroe and Rosalee piece together information about the curse and eventually work out how the passion spell can be broken. Meanwhile, Adalind returns to Renards duplicitous brother in Vienna

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: Three Wesen break the laws of their race by openly revealing their supernatural nature while committing a series of bank robberies, and Juliette is tormented by hallucinations

programme.title: Most Haunted
programme.desc: Yvette Fielding, Kevin Wade and the team visit Port Talbot in south Wales. At Margam Castle, they investigate strange noises which could be attributed to the weather. However, the ghosts of Victorian children and a malevolent gamekeeper who was murdered on the grounds are said to live there

programme.title: Most Haunted
programme.desc: Carol Thatcher joins Yvette Fielding and the team at Tatton Old Hall, Cheshire, a 15th-century farmhouse home to reports of a mischievous ghostly presence

programme.desc: An alien archiving device begins to transform the Enterprise into a replica of its ancient society, and Data is taken over by a series of personalities from the era. Sci-fi drama, starring Brent Spiner

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Ensign Kim experiences a sense of deja vu when the crew encounter an alien race in an unknown region of space. He soon discovers he is native to the region and is TKarian, not human. Sci-fi drama, starring Kate Mulgrew and Garrett Wang

programme.desc: Kai Winn experiences a vision that drives her to seek aid from a disguised Dukat, and Captain Siskos relationship with Kasidy is jeopardised. Sci-fi adventure, starring Louise Fletcher and Avery Brooks

programme.title: Warehouse 13
programme.desc: Pete and Myka trace two cases of a strange rusting disease to a factory run by a shady character named Siskel, and their investigation uncovers links between a boxer and an explosion at a museum. Sci-fi thriller, starring Eddie McClintock and Joanne Kelly

programme.title: Warehouse 13
programme.desc: Artie and Leena stay in the Warehouse to find Brother Adrian, while Pete, Myka and Claudia try to save their loved ones from the clerics artefacts. Mrs Frederic and Jinks visit Rome, attempting to speak with another representative of the Black Diamond Brotherhood

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: The team undertakes a mission to disrupt an alliance between the influential System Lords Apophis and Heruur, while Tealc travels to Chulak to recruit support from the Jaffa warriors in the fight against the Goauld. Sci-fi drama, starring Richard Dean Anderson and Christopher Judge

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Ensign Kim experiences a sense of deja vu when the crew encounter an alien race in an unknown region of space. He soon discovers he is native to the region and is TKarian, not human. Sci-fi drama, starring Kate Mulgrew and Garrett Wang

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: An alien archiving device begins to transform the Enterprise into a replica of its ancient society, and Data is taken over by a series of personalities from the era. Sci-fi drama, starring Brent Spiner

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Kai Winn experiences a vision that drives her to seek aid from a disguised Dukat, and Captain Siskos relationship with Kasidy is jeopardised. Sci-fi adventure, starring Louise Fletcher and Avery Brooks

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: The team undertakes a mission to disrupt an alliance between the influential System Lords Apophis and Heruur, while Tealc travels to Chulak to recruit support from the Jaffa warriors in the fight against the Goauld. Sci-fi drama, starring Richard Dean Anderson and Christopher Judge

programme.title: From
programme.desc: The Matthews family road trip takes a horrifying turn when they are detoured to a small town and find themselves looping back to it repeatedly until they encounter another car that runs them off the road. Sheriff Boyd Stevens and other residents rush to save them before the sun goes down. Sci-fi horror, starring Harold Perrineau and Catalina Sandino Moreno

programme.title: From
programme.desc: At Colony House, Tabitha and Julie grapple with their new nightmarish reality, while out in the forest, Jim, Boyd and Kristi struggle to treat Ethans injuries. Tragedy strikes from an unexpected source as a new threat arises. Sci-fi horror, starring Harold Perrineau and Catalina Sandino Moreno

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The scouting party returns from the woods to find a large group of walkers has located the farm. With their sanctuary destroyed, the survivors are forced to split up and flee for their lives - and as things turn grim, many of them call Ricks leadership into question. But it soon becomes clear he is not the same man he used to be. Post-apocalyptic drama, starring Andrew Lincoln

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The post-apocalyptic drama returns. Having left the relative safety of Hershels farm, the survivors find their nomadic existence wearing them down. Rick and Daryls discovery of a prison seems to provide a good opportunity to establish a new base camp, but the compound is not uninhabited. Starring Andrew Lincoln and Norman Reedus

programme.title: Warehouse 13
programme.desc: Pete and Myka trace two cases of a strange rusting disease to a factory run by a shady character named Siskel, and their investigation uncovers links between a boxer and an explosion at a museum. Sci-fi thriller, starring Eddie McClintock and Joanne Kelly

programme.title: Warehouse 13
programme.desc: Artie and Leena stay in the Warehouse to find Brother Adrian, while Pete, Myka and Claudia try to save their loved ones from the clerics artefacts. Mrs Frederic and Jinks visit Rome, attempting to speak with another representative of the Black Diamond Brotherhood

programme.desc: Sheldon and Leonard invent excuses to avoid having to attend Pennys performance in a production of the stage musical Rent, but maintaining the pretence makes matters increasingly complicated. Johnny Galecki, Simon Helberg and Kaley Cuoco star, with DJ Qualls

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon falls ill, and his friends decide to go to a Planet of the Apes movie marathon to keep their distance, knowing he will be in a terrible mood. However, an unsuspecting Penny offers to nurse him. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Simon Helberg and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon feels threatened by a 15-year-old physics prodigy who is even cleverer than he is, and asks Leonard to help him discredit the precocious teenagers research. Johnny Gale and Jim Parsons star

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard, Raj and Howard kick Sheldon off their physics quiz team and replace him with Leslie Winkle, so he decides to prove his superiority by forming a rival quartet of his own. Johnny Gale and Jim Parsons star

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny makes fun of Leonards habit of collecting sci-fi memorabilia, so he decides to give it up - but his friends object and do everything possible to persuade him not to change his ways. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: Mike and Molly
programme.desc: A prestigious writers workshop in Iowa offers Molly a place, but as the house now includes Peggy and Carl, she struggles to find a way to break the news to Mike. Comedy, starring Billy Gardell and Melissa McCarthy

programme.title: Mike and Molly
programme.desc: In the fifth season premiere, Molly returns home after eight weeks at the prestigious writers workshop with exciting news - she is getting her book published and has received a generous advance. Comedy, starring Billy Gardell and Melissa McCarthy

programme.title: Mike and Molly
programme.desc: Carl has a suggestion for Mike that regular sex could be stifling Mollys creativity, as she reluctantly admits that she is suffering from writers block. Starring Billy Gardell and Melissa McCarthy

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.sub-title: A Clogged Pore, a Little Spanish and the Future
programme.desc: The prodigy gets his first spot and is very worried about going through puberty and his childhood ending. Comedy, starring Iain Armitage

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: Pilot episode of the comedy prequel to The Big Bang Theory about nine-year-old Sheldon Cooper. He possesses a once-in-a-generation mind capable of advanced mathematics and science, but finds that gift isnt always helpful growing up in East Texas, a land where church and football are king. Iain Armitage stars

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.sub-title: Rockets, Communists and the Dewey Decimal System
programme.desc: To appease his mother, who worries that he might be lonely, Sheldon employs the techniques described in a self-help book from the library in an attempt to make a friend

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldons friends all fall for his sexy twin sister, who is paying him a visit, but he declares he will have the final say on who can date her - an announcement that particularly dismays Leonard. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki and Jim Parsons

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny finds out Leonards family never celebrated his birthdays, so she enlists Sheldons help to organise a surprise party, while Howard gets him out of the way by staging an emergency hospital visit. Kaley Cuoco and Johnny Galecki star

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Following the break-up of Pennys relationship, Leonard finally summons up the courage to ask her out. When she accepts, they both turn to Sheldon for advice on how to handle the forthcoming date. Johnny Galecki, Kaley Cuoco and Jim Parsons star

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon finds himself forced to keep a secret when Penny decides to tell him what happened on her disappointing first date with Leonard. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Kaley Cuoco and Jim Parsons

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard is dejected to see Penny with another man and decides to cut his losses by going back to fellow scientist Leslie Winkle - a move that upsets Sheldon. Starring Johnny Galecki, Kaley Cuoco and Sara Gilbert

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny becomes addicted to an online game based on the world of Conan the Barbarian. As her obsession intensifies, she begins to neglect her friends and seeks the company of the usually snide Sheldon, whom she continually pesters for advice. Starring Kaley Cuoco and Jim Parsons

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Elated at being named one of People magazines 30 to Watch Under 30, Raj makes a pass at Penny and becomes very arrogant, making it hard for Leonard to maintain a positive perspective on his friends new-found confidence. Guest starring Charlie Sheen

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon is forced to confront his fear of driving when both Penny and Howard refuse to give him a lift to work. Desperate to be free of the obligation, Leonard and the gang intervene to discover why their friend never learnt to drive. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons and Johnny Galecki, with Octavia Spencer

programme.title: Mock the Week
programme.desc: Dara Ó Briain introduces topical chat and hilarious games with guests Rhys James, Ahir Shah, Angela Barnes, Lou Sanders, Ed Byrne and Milton Jones

programme.title: Zero Stars
programme.desc: Roisin Conaty and Sara Pascoe explore Bergen and Voss on a budget, dining at a Norwegian buffet, playing black metal and canoeing to find rubbish on a fjord.

programme.title: Dr Pimple Popper
programme.desc: Lisa fears the bump growing out of the back of her head could be cancerous, and two teenage brothers have matching lumps

programme.title: Dr Pimple Popper
programme.desc: Brittney has hundreds of tiny bumps over her chest that have destroyed her confidence. John has a nose the size of a plum and leans on his local family clinic for help

programme.title: Dr Pimple Popper
programme.desc: Jimmy wants his flaky, raised alligator-like skin cured so he can find love. Djuka has a stubborn bump, and Talina has hundreds of tumours on her body

programme.title: My 600lb Life
programme.desc: Bed-bound for two years, Lashanta relies on her children to clean and feed her. Shes determined to join Dr Nows programme, but needs help to leave the house

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: UK
programme.desc: Bride Jackie is confused about what dress she wants. Meanwhile, Gemma returns to try on her dress, but she cannot fit into it

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: UK
programme.desc: David has his work cut out trying to find a dress for bride Kerri, and Hannah thinks she has made a big mistake with the dress she has chosen

programme.title: School For Sex (1969)
programme.desc: A fraudster hatches a plan to open his own finishing school, where women can learn how to use sex to take advantage of wealthy men. However, the sudden appearance of his students in high society raises the suspicions of the police and the media. Comedy, starring Derek Aylward and Rose Alba

programme.title: Buster (1988)
programme.desc: Fact-based crime drama about the life of Buster Edwards, a member of the gang responsible for the Great Train Robbery. Going on the run after the notorious heist, he flees to Mexico with his family. However, his homesick wife struggles to adapt to her new life, leaving the outlaw with a difficult choice. Starring Phil Collins, Julie Walters, Sheila Hancock, Larry Lamb and Ralph Brown

programme.desc: Kims relatives live all over the world, and when they do visit, they avoid gathering in Kims tired, unloved garden. This prompts Flo Headlam and Charlie Dimmock to head to Luton, Bedfordshire, to create a cottage garden for Kim who has a budget of £4,000 to make the most of the outdoor space

programme.title: Garden Rescue
programme.desc: Charlie Dimmock and Lee Burkhill head to Shaftesbury where they compete to design a garden that green-fingered Sonia will love. Since her eye condition has worsened, Sonia has found her outside more of a challenge to maintain, so Charlie and Lee create designs to appeal to her sense of smell and touch

programme.title: Hello Campers
programme.desc: Former bluecoat Mark Goddard gets to grips with sandwiches by the seaside, volleyball, bingo and karaoke as he takes a tour through the history of holiday camps. In the first episode, he meets a group of families whove taken their annual break at the same place in Norfolk for more than 30 years, and tries his hand at a traditional sport _ welly-wanging

programme.title: The Assassination Bureau (1968)
programme.desc: A tenacious journalist sets out to track down a society of hired killers. However, shes taken aback by the smooth sophistication of the organisations leader. She comes up with a singularly appropriate challenge for him - but events are complicated by a conniving nobleman. Period comedy thriller, starring Diana Rigg, Oliver Reed, Telly Savalas, Curt Jurgens, Warren Mitchell and Beryl Reid

programme.title: The Odd Job (1978)
programme.desc: Comedy. A despondent man hires a professional assassin to take himself out. Stars David Jason and Monty Pythons Graham Chapman.

programme.title: Vendetta for the Saint (1969)
programme.desc: The suave anti-hero investigates a murder in Naples, but ends up facing the Sicilian Mafia. Action adventure, starring Roger Moore, Ian Hendry and Rosemary Dexter

programme.title: Garden Rescue
programme.desc: Kims relatives live all over the world, and when they do visit, they avoid gathering in Kims tired, unloved garden. This prompts Flo Headlam and Charlie Dimmock to head to Luton, Bedfordshire, to create a cottage garden for Kim who has a budget of £4,000 to make the most of the outdoor space

programme.title: Garden Rescue
programme.desc: Becky and Paul and their two children live on the edge of the picturesque Quantocks near Taunton, Somerset, but are struggling with the strange dog-legged shape of their new-build garden. Charlie Dimmock and Chris Hull use a £6,000 budget to transform its landscaping and introduce a cracked paving patio and bespoke seating area, with a dry stone wall façade. While Chris drives the main garden build, Charlie get to tackle the dog-leg, which Chris has designed to be a fun kids area with a water play area and wooden musical instruments

programme.title: Hussy (1980)
programme.desc: A prostitute works out of a seedy London nightclub to support her son. She begins a relationship with a mysterious American, but their relationship is threatened by both her career and his murky past, especially when an old friend of her lover appears with a criminal scheme in mind. Drama, starring Helen Mirren and John Shea

programme.title: Groupie Girl (1970)
programme.desc: Sally runs away from her strict upbringing to become a rock bands groupie. A cautionary tale of hairy hippies and heartbreak. Drama starring Esme Johns and Donald Sumpter.

programme.title: Comfort and Joy (1984)
programme.desc: A radio DJs life changes when he finds himself mediating between two Italian gangsters over Glasgows ice cream market. Comedy, starring Bill Forsyth and Clare Grogan.

programme.title: Richard Wilsons Highland Fling
programme.desc: The actor explores the Highlands and islands of his native Scotland in grand style, from travelling by rail on the Belmond Royal Scotsman to cruising on the Hebridean Princess

programme.title: Love Your Garden
programme.desc: Alan Titchmarsh and the team head to Chessington to create a car-themed garden for hospital worker and automobile fan Alan Rendall. In July 2014, he managed to rescue his unconscious neighbour, Roy Whiteway, from his burning house, but was unable to save Dorothy, Roys wife, as the fire was so intense. To recognise his bravery, Alan and the team surprise the whole Rendall family and turn their featureless plot into an automobile-inspired haven

programme.title: Rick Steins Food Stories
programme.desc: Rick is in Leicester, where food writer Gurdeep Loyal gives him a tour of the citys best Indian food, from a hidden gem food truck to Indian high tea. He also samples Michelin-starred fare from Birmingham chef Aktar Islam and hears the story of how a traditional mill was saved by the local demand for chapati flour. Back home Rick cooks the UKs favourite, chicken tikka masala

programme.title: Robson Greens Weekend Escapes
programme.desc: The actor is joined by crime fiction author LJ Ross on a trip along the Northumbrian Coast. The duo visit Holy Island - the setting for the writers first novel - where they join a tour guide to find out more about the religious connections with the area. The actor is then joined by his partner Zoila for a caravan stay on a cattle farm before taking to the skies in a lightweight aircraft

programme.title: Close Calls: On Camera
programme.desc: A farmer is speared on his own tractor, with the scale of the drama captured on a recording of a neighbours 999 call for an ambulance. Plus, a solo free climber films his own fall from a sheer rock face. Presented by Nick Knowles

programme.desc: The padre finds his position under threat when he clashes with an influential new parishioner. Fifties-set crime drama based on the stories by GK Chesterton, starring Mark Williams

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: The crime-solving cleric takes the lead when a television dancing competition turns deadly. Angela Rippon guest stars as the Dancing Duchess, the host of the contest, alongside regulars Mark Williams, Claudie Blakley and Ruby-May Martinwood

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: The Murdochs housewarming party is cut short when a man is cooked to the point of exploding in a closet-sized microwave prototype. Return of the crime drama, starring Yannick Bisson

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Julia refuses to accept the blame when one of her patients dies after surgery, and her investigations reveal an unusual pattern of deaths among alcoholics on the ward

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: An alien species intent on wiping out the human race invades Toronto, and Crabtree becomes humanitys last hope for salvation. Non-canon Halloween special

programme.title: Inspector George Gently
programme.desc: Bacchus and Gently investigate a consignment of stolen passports, but the case takes an unexpected turn when a woman linked to the crime is found dead on the seashore with her mixed-race baby lying next to her. As the duo follow a lead on the murder victims ex-boyfriend, they encounter racial prejudice and are drawn into an underground world of gang wars within the Arab community. Primevals Andrew-Lee Potts guest stars

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: The Roman Catholic priest joins forces with Flambeau to hunt for a priceless holy relic, while a new nemesis lurks in the shadows. Mystery drama, starring Mark Williams

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: The inquisitive cleric investigates when his old friend Blind Arry is arrested for murder at an Almshouse. Mystery drama, guest starring Anita Dobson, Linda Thorson and Diana Hardcastle

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: When Lady Felicia invites a prestigious group of writers to Montague, her hopes of being published are eclipsed by murder. Fifties-set crime drama based on the stories by GK Chesterton, starring Mark Williams and Nancy Carroll

programme.title: Shakespeare and Hathaway: Private Investigators
programme.sub-title: O Thou Invisible Spirit of Wine
programme.desc: Frank and Lu are hired to locate a photograph stolen from a local pub, whose owner is in the middle of a feud with another local family - only for events to take a deadly turn

programme.title: Shakespeare and Hathaway: Private Investigators
programme.desc: Frank and Lu delve into the ultra-competitive world of private tutoring, while a reunion with an old Rada friend, presents Sebastian with a choice about his future that could change everything for the agency. Tamzin Outhwaite guest stars, with Mark Benton and Jo Joyner

programme.title: Miss Scarlet and the Duke
programme.desc: New Detective Inspector Charlie Phelps hires Eliza for a case involving his uncle, but Scotland Yard is also after the man, who has committed crimes in both jurisdictions

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.sub-title: The Fall of the House of Newsome
programme.desc: Rupert Newsome is accused of murdering his wife Lucinda, and despite his choice to represent himself in court, Effie tries her best to help

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: The clerical sleuth investigates staff at the local health spa when an ex-employee is found murdered. Crime drama based on the stories by GK Chesterton, with Mark Williams

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: A stag do ends in tragedy when the host of a celebratory fishing trip is found harpooned on a beach the following morning. As the boat never moved, DI Neville Parker and his team struggle to determine how anyone in attendance could have been responsible. Caribbean-set detective drama, starring Ralf Little and Josephine Jobert

programme.title: NCIS: Sydney
programme.desc: When JDs son Jack is kidnapped by an international assassin in exchange for a wanted criminal in NCIS custody, the team frantically tries to get him back

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: A man suspected of killing a police officer is seen near Kembleford and Mallory is determined to catch him, but he has to ask the sleuthing priest for help when disaster strikes

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Richard Poole meets up with a group of old university friends who have arrived on the island for a reunion, only for tragedy to strike when the man who has solved so many murders becomes the victim. Faced with such a sensitive crime, the commissioner quickly drafts in another British inspector to help the team get to the bottom of the mystery. It soon becomes clear that the newcomer, Humphrey Goodman, is just as eccentric as Poole - but he is also just as bright, and wastes no time questioning the partygoers, all of whom are prime suspects, while pondering the biggest mystery of all - how did the culprit commit the crime in full view of all the other guests? Kris Marshall joins the cast, with Ben Miller, Sara Martins and Danny John-Jules

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Richard Poole meets up with a group of old university friends who have arrived on the island for a reunion, only for tragedy to strike when the man who has solved so many murders becomes the victim. Faced with such a sensitive crime, the commissioner quickly drafts in another British inspector to help the team get to the bottom of the mystery. It soon becomes clear that the newcomer, Humphrey Goodman, is just as eccentric as Poole - but he is also just as bright, and wastes no time questioning the partygoers, all of whom are prime suspects, while pondering the biggest mystery of all - how did the culprit commit the crime in full view of all the other guests? Kris Marshall joins the cast, with Ben Miller, Sara Martins and Danny John-Jules
